    30→zrbrn_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrn already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Set defaults for all fields (validate enforces required-ness)
    34→  RBRN_MONIKER="${RBRN_MONIKER:-}"
    35→  RBRN_DESCRIPTION="${RBRN_DESCRIPTION:-}"
    36→  RBRN_RUNTIME="${RBRN_RUNTIME:-}"
    37→  RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL="${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL:-}"
    38→  RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL="${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL:-}"
    39→  RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION="${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION:-}"
    40→  RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION="${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION:-}"
    41→  RBRN_ENTRY_MODE="${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE:-}"
    42→  RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-}"
    43→  RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-}"
    44→  RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP:-}"
    45→  RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK:-}"
    46→  RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP:-}"
    47→  RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP="${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP:-}"
    48→  RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN="${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN:-}"
    49→  RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE="${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE:-}"
    50→  RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE="${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE:-}"
    51→  RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS="${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS:-}"
    52→  RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS="${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS:-}"
    53→  RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS="${RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS:-}"
    54→
    55→  # Detect unexpected RBRN_ variables
    56→  local z_known="RBRN_MONIKER RBRN_DESCRIPTION RBRN_RUNTIME RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION RBRN_ENTRY_MODE RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS"
    57→  ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED=()
    58→  local z_var
    59→  for z_var in $(compgen -v RBRN_); do
    60→    case " ${z_known} " in
    61→      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
    62→      *) ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED+=("${z_var}") ;;
    63→    esac
    64→  done
    65→
    66→  # Build rollup of all RBRN_ variables for passing to scripts/containers
    67→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP=""
    68→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_MONIKER='${RBRN_MONIKER}' "
    69→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_DESCRIPTION='${RBRN_DESCRIPTION}' "
    70→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_RUNTIME='${RBRN_RUNTIME}' "
    71→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL='${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}' "
    72→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL='${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}' "
    73→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION='${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}' "
    74→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION='${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}' "
    75→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENTRY_MODE='${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}' "
    76→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION='${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}' "
    77→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE='${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE}' "
    78→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP='${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}' "
    79→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK='${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}' "
    80→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP='${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}' "
    81→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP='${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}' "
    82→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN='${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}' "
    83→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE='${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE}' "
    84→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE='${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE}' "
    85→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS='${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS}' "
    86→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS='${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS}' "
    87→  ZRBRN_ROLLUP+="RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS='${RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS}'"
    88→
    89→  # Build docker env args array for container injection
    90→  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
    91→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV=()
    92→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_MONIKER=${RBRN_MONIKER}")
    93→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_DESCRIPTION=${RBRN_DESCRIPTION}")
    94→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_RUNTIME=${RBRN_RUNTIME}")
    95→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL=${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}")
    96→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL=${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}")
    97→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION=${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}")
    98→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION=${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}")
    99→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENTRY_MODE=${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}")
   100→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION=${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}")
   101→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE=${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE}")
   102→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}")
   103→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}")
   104→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}")
   105→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}")
   106→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN=${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}")
   107→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE=${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE}")
   108→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE=${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE}")
   109→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS=${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS}")
   110→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS=${RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS}")
   111→  ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV+=("-e" "RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS=${RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS}")
   112→
   113→  ZRBRN_KINDLED=1
   114→}
   115→
   116→zrbrn_sentinel() {
   117→  test "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrn not kindled - call zrbrn_kindle first"
   118→}
   119→
   120→# Validate RBRN variables via buv_env_* (dies on first error)
   121→# Prerequisite: kindle must have been called; buv_validation.sh must be sourced
   122→zrbrn_validate_fields() {
   123→  zrbrn_sentinel
   124→
   125→  # Die on unexpected variables
   126→  if test ${#ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   127→    buc_die "Unexpected RBRN_ variables: ${ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED[*]}"
   128→  fi
   129→
   130→  # Core nameplate identification
   131→  buv_env_xname       RBRN_MONIKER                 2     12
   132→  buv_env_string      RBRN_DESCRIPTION             0    120
   133→  buv_env_string      RBRN_RUNTIME                 1     16
   134→
   135→  # Validate runtime is docker or podman
   136→  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
   137→    docker|podman) : ;;
   138→    *) buc_die "Invalid RBRN_RUNTIME: '${RBRN_RUNTIME}' (must be 'docker' or 'podman')" ;;
   139→  esac
   140→
   141→  # Container image configuration
   142→  buv_env_fqin        RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL        1    128
   143→  buv_env_fqin        RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL        1    128
   144→  buv_env_fqin        RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION        1    128
   145→  buv_env_fqin        RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION        1    128
   146→
   147→  # Entry point configuration
   148→  case "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" in
   149→    disabled|enabled) : ;;
   150→    *) buc_die "Invalid RBRN_ENTRY_MODE: '${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}' (must be 'disabled' or 'enabled')" ;;
   151→  esac
   152→
   153→  # Enclave network configuration
   154→  buv_env_ipv4        RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP
   155→  buv_env_decimal     RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK         8     30
   156→  buv_env_ipv4        RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP
   157→  buv_env_ipv4        RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP
   158→
   159→  # Verify IPs fall within declared subnet
   160→  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"
   161→  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"
   162→
   163→  # Uplink configuration
   164→  buv_env_port        RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN
   165→  case "${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE}" in
   166→    disabled|global|allowlist) : ;;
   167→    *) buc_die "Invalid RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE: '${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE}' (must be 'disabled', 'global', or 'allowlist')" ;;
   168→  esac
   169→  case "${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE}" in
   170→    disabled|global|allowlist) : ;;
   171→    *) buc_die "Invalid RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE: '${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE}' (must be 'disabled', 'global', or 'allowlist')" ;;
   172→  esac
   173→
   174→  # Conditional entry port validation (Required: When ENTRY_MODE=enabled)
   175→  if [[ $RBRN_ENTRY_MODE == enabled ]]; then
   176→    buv_env_port    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION
   177→    buv_env_port    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE
   178→
   179→    test ${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION} -lt ${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN} || \
   180→      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
   181→    test ${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE} -lt ${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN} || \
   182→      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
   183→  fi
   184→
   185→  # Conditional allowlist validation (Required: When *_MODE=allowlist)
   186→  if [[ ${RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE} == allowlist ]]; then
   187→    buv_env_list_cidr RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS
   188→  fi
   189→  if [[ ${RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE} == allowlist ]]; then
   190→    buv_env_list_domain RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS
   191→  fi
   192→
   193→  # Volume mount configuration (Required: No)
   194→  buv_env_string      RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS           0    240
   195→}
   196→
   197→######################################################################
   198→# Public Functions (rbrn_*)
   199→
   200→# Load nameplate regime by moniker
   201→# Usage: rbrn_load_moniker <moniker>
   202→# Constructs path, verifies file exists, sources, kindles, and validates
   203→rbrn_load_moniker() {
   204→  local z_moniker="${1:-}"
   205→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "rbrn_load_moniker: moniker argument required"
   206→
   207→  local z_nameplate_file="${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/${RBCC_RBRN_PREFIX}${z_moniker}${RBCC_RBRN_EXT}"
   208→  test -f "${z_nameplate_file}" || buc_die "Nameplate not found: ${z_nameplate_file}"
   209→
   210→  source "${z_nameplate_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source nameplate: ${z_nameplate_file}"
   211→  zrbrn_kindle
   212→  zrbrn_validate_fields
   213→}
   214→
   215→# Load nameplate regime by file path
   216→# Usage: rbrn_load_file <path>
   217→# Takes explicit file path, sources, kindles, and validates
   218→rbrn_load_file() {
   219→  local z_file="${1:-}"
   220→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrn_load_file: file argument required"
   221→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrn_load_file: file not found: ${z_file}"
   222→
   223→  source "${z_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source nameplate: ${z_file}"
   224→  zrbrn_kindle
   225→  zrbrn_validate_fields
   226→}
   227→
   228→# List available nameplate monikers
   229→# Usage: rbrn_list
   230→# Returns list of concrete nameplate monikers by globbing rbrn_*.env files
   231→rbrn_list() {
   232→  local z_nameplate_files=("${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/${RBCC_RBRN_PREFIX}"*"${RBCC_RBRN_EXT}")
   233→
   234→  for z_file in "${z_nameplate_files[@]}"; do
   235→    test -f "${z_file}" || continue
   236→    local z_basename="${z_file##*/}"
   237→    local z_moniker="${z_basename#${RBCC_RBRN_PREFIX}}"
   238→    z_moniker="${z_moniker%${RBCC_RBRN_EXT}}"
   239→    echo "${z_moniker}"
   240→  done
   241→}
   242→
   243→######################################################################
   244→# Cross-Nameplate Functions
   245→#
   246→# These iterate all nameplates by direct-sourcing .env files in
   247→# subshells to avoid kindle-once guard conflicts.
   248→#
   249→# rbrn_preflight: Requires RBCC kindled
   250→# rbrn_survey:    Requires RBCC, RBGC, RBGD kindled + RBRR loaded
   251→# rbrn_audit:     Requires RBCC, RBGC, RBGD kindled + RBRR loaded
   252→
   253→# Convert dotted-quad IPv4 to integer for subnet arithmetic
   254→zrbrn_ip_to_int() {
   255→  local z_a z_b z_c z_d
   256→  IFS='.' read -r z_a z_b z_c z_d <<< "$1"
   257→  echo $(( (z_a << 24) + (z_b << 16) + (z_c << 8) + z_d ))
   258→}
   259→
   260→# Validate that an IP falls within a subnet (dies if not)
   261→# Usage: zrbrn_ip_in_subnet LABEL IP BASE MASK
   262→zrbrn_ip_in_subnet() {
   263→  local z_label="$1" z_ip="$2" z_base="$3" z_mask="$4"
   264→  local z_ip_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_ip}")
   265→  local z_base_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
   266→  local z_net_mask=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
   267→  if [[ $(( z_ip_int & z_net_mask )) -ne $(( z_base_int & z_net_mask )) ]]; then
   268→    buc_die "${z_label}=${z_ip} is not within subnet ${z_base}/${z_mask}"
   269→  fi
   270→}
   271→
   272→# Cross-nameplate conflict validation (silent on success, dies on conflict)
   273→# Checks: port uniqueness, subnet non-overlap, enclave IP uniqueness
   274→rbrn_preflight() {
   275→  zrbcc_sentinel
   276→
   277→  # Collect structured data from all nameplates via subshell sourcing
   278→  local z_data
   279→  z_data=$(
   280→    for z_m in $(rbrn_list); do
   281→      z_f="${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/${RBCC_RBRN_PREFIX}${z_m}${RBCC_RBRN_EXT}"
   282→      (
   283→        source "${z_f}"
   284→        echo "${RBRN_MONIKER}|${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-0}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-0}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}"
   285→      )
   286→    done
   287→  )
   288→
   289→  # Parallel arrays for conflict detection (bash 3.2 compatible)
   290→  local z_ws_port_keys=()
   291→  local z_ws_port_vals=()
   292→  local z_enc_port_keys=()
   293→  local z_enc_port_vals=()
   294→  local z_ip_keys=()
   295→  local z_ip_vals=()
   296→  local z_net_starts=()
   297→  local z_net_ends=()
   298→  local z_net_owners=()
   299→
   300→  local z_mon z_entry z_ws z_enc z_base z_mask z_sentry z_bottle
   301→  while IFS='|' read -r z_mon z_entry z_ws z_enc z_base z_mask z_sentry z_bottle; do
   302→    test -n "${z_mon}" || continue
   303→
   304→    # Workstation and enclave port uniqueness (enabled entries only)
   305→    if [[ "${z_entry}" == "enabled" ]]; then
   306→      local z_i
   307→      for z_i in "${!z_ws_port_keys[@]}"; do
   308→        if [[ "${z_ws_port_keys[$z_i]}" == "${z_ws}" ]]; then
   309→          buc_die "Port conflict: RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION=${z_ws} claimed by both ${z_ws_port_vals[$z_i]} and ${z_mon}"
   310→        fi
   311→      done
   312→      z_ws_port_keys+=("${z_ws}")
   313→      z_ws_port_vals+=("${z_mon}")
   314→
   315→      for z_i in "${!z_enc_port_keys[@]}"; do
   316→        if [[ "${z_enc_port_keys[$z_i]}" == "${z_enc}" ]]; then
   317→          buc_die "Port conflict: RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE=${z_enc} claimed by both ${z_enc_port_vals[$z_i]} and ${z_mon}"
   318→        fi
   319→      done
   320→      z_enc_port_keys+=("${z_enc}")
   321→      z_enc_port_vals+=("${z_mon}")
   322→    fi
   323→
   324→    # Enclave IP uniqueness (all sentry and bottle IPs across nameplates)
   325→    local z_j
   326→    for z_j in "${!z_ip_keys[@]}"; do
   327→      if [[ "${z_ip_keys[$z_j]}" == "${z_sentry}" ]]; then
   328→        buc_die "IP conflict: ${z_sentry} claimed by ${z_mon} (sentry) and ${z_ip_vals[$z_j]}"
   329→      fi
   330→    done
   331→    z_ip_keys+=("${z_sentry}")
   332→    z_ip_vals+=("${z_mon}:sentry")
   333→
   334→    for z_j in "${!z_ip_keys[@]}"; do
   335→      if [[ "${z_ip_keys[$z_j]}" == "${z_bottle}" ]]; then
   336→        buc_die "IP conflict: ${z_bottle} claimed by ${z_mon} (bottle) and ${z_ip_vals[$z_j]}"
   337→      fi
   338→    done
   339→    z_ip_keys+=("${z_bottle}")
   340→    z_ip_vals+=("${z_mon}:bottle")
   341→
   342→    # Subnet non-overlap
   343→    local z_net_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
   344→    local z_net_mask_bits=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
   345→    local z_net_addr=$(( z_net_int & z_net_mask_bits ))
   346→    local z_net_size=$(( 1 << (32 - z_mask) ))
   347→    local z_net_end=$(( z_net_addr + z_net_size - 1 ))
   348→
   349→    local z_k
   350→    for z_k in "${!z_net_starts[@]}"; do
   351→      if [[ ${z_net_addr} -le ${z_net_ends[$z_k]} ]] && [[ ${z_net_starts[$z_k]} -le ${z_net_end} ]]; then
   352→        buc_die "Subnet overlap: ${z_base}/${z_mask} (${z_mon}) overlaps with network of ${z_net_owners[$z_k]}"
   353→      fi
   354→    done
   355→    z_net_starts+=("${z_net_addr}")
   356→    z_net_ends+=("${z_net_end}")
   357→    z_net_owners+=("${z_mon}")
   358→
   359→  done <<< "${z_data}"
   360→}
   361→
   362→# Fleet info table — non-opinionated display of all nameplate configuration
   363→# Requires: RBCC, RBGC, RBGD kindled + RBRR loaded
   364→rbrn_survey() {
   365→  zrbcc_sentinel
   366→  zrbgc_sentinel
   367→  zrbgd_sentinel
   368→  zrbrr_sentinel
   369→
   370→  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
   371→
   372→  echo ""
   373→  printf "%-10s %-8s %6s %6s  %-17s %-14s %-14s  %3s %3s\n" \
   374→    "Moniker" "Entry" "WS" "Enc" "Subnet" "Sentry IP" "Bottle IP" "Snt" "Btl"
   375→  printf "%-10s %-8s %6s %6s  %-17s %-14s %-14s  %3s %3s\n" \
   376→    "--------" "-----" "------" "------" "-----------------" "--------------" "--------------" "---" "---"
   377→
   378→  local z_moniker z_file
   379→  for z_moniker in $(rbrn_list); do
   380→    z_file="${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/${RBCC_RBRN_PREFIX}${z_moniker}${RBCC_RBRN_EXT}"
   381→    (
   382→      source "${z_file}"
   383→
   384→      local z_sentry_img="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
   385→      local z_bottle_img="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
   386→
   387→      local z_sentry_local="--"
   388→      local z_bottle_local="--"
   389→      if command -v "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   390→        ${RBRN_RUNTIME} image inspect "${z_sentry_img}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_sentry_local="ok"
   391→        ${RBRN_RUNTIME} image inspect "${z_bottle_img}" >/dev/null 2>&1 && z_bottle_local="ok"
   392→      else
   393→        z_sentry_local="??"
   394→        z_bottle_local="??"
   395→      fi
   396→
   397→      local z_ws_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-}"
   398→      local z_enc_port="${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-}"
   399→      if [[ "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" != "enabled" ]]; then
   400→        z_ws_port="-"
   401→        z_enc_port="-"
   402→      fi
   403→
   404→      printf "%-10s %-8s %6s %6s  %-17s %-14s %-14s  %3s %3s\n" \
   405→        "${RBRN_MONIKER}" "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" "${z_ws_port}" "${z_enc_port}" \
   406→        "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}/${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}" \
   407→        "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" \
   408→        "${z_sentry_local}" "${z_bottle_local}"
   409→    )
   410→  done
   411→  echo ""
   412→}
   413→
   414→# Audit — survey display then preflight validation
   415→rbrn_audit() {
   416→  rbrn_survey
   417→  rbrn_preflight
   418→  buc_step "Cross-nameplate audit passed"
   419→}
   420→
   421→# eof
   422→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle Payor Regime - Validator Module
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBRP_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrp multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBRP_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbrp_*)
    29→
    30→zrbrp_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBRP_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrp already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Requires RBGC for pattern constants
    34→  zrbgc_sentinel
    35→
    36→  # Precompute suggested project ID for error messages
    37→  local z_suggested_id="${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-$(date ${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT})"
    38→
    39→  # Validate RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID exists
    40→  if [ -z "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID:-}" ]; then
    41→    buc_warn "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID is not set"
    42→    buc_step "To set a fresh value, run:"
    43→    buc_code "sed -i '' 's/^RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=.*/RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=${z_suggested_id}/' rbrp.env"
    44→    buc_die "Cannot proceed without RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID"
    45→  fi
    46→
    47→  # Validate RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID matches global naming pattern
    48→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}" | grep -qE "${RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX}"; then
    49→    buc_warn "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID '${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}' does not match required pattern"
    50→    buc_step "Expected pattern: ${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-YYMMDDHHMMSS"
    51→    buc_step "To set a fresh value, run the following and then git commit:"
    52→    buc_code "sed -i '' 's/^RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=.*/RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=${z_suggested_id}/' rbrp.env"
    53→    buc_die "Invalid RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID format"
    54→  fi
    55→
    56→  # Validate RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID format (optional during initial setup)
    57→  if [ -n "${RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID:-}" ]; then
    58→    if ! printf '%s' "${RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID}" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]{6}-[A-Z0-9]{6}-[A-Z0-9]{6}$'; then
    59→      buc_warn "RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID '${RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID}' does not match required format"
    60→      buc_step "Expected format: XXXXXX-XXXXXX-XXXXXX (e.g., 01A2B3-4C5D6E-7F8G9H)"
    61→      buc_die "Invalid RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID format"
    62→    fi
    63→  fi
    64→
    65→  # Validate RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID format (optional during initial setup)
    66→  if [ -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" ]; then
    67→    if ! printf '%s' "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID}" | grep -qE '\.apps\.googleusercontent\.com$'; then
    68→      buc_warn "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID '${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID}' does not match required format"
    69→      buc_step "Expected format: <client-id>.apps.googleusercontent.com"
    70→      buc_die "Invalid RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID format"
    71→    fi
    72→  fi
    73→
    74→  ZRBRP_KINDLED=1
    75→}
    76→
    77→zrbrp_sentinel() {
    78→  test "${ZRBRP_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrp not kindled - call zrbrp_kindle first"
    79→}
    80→
    81→######################################################################
    82→# Public Functions (rbrp_*)
    83→
    84→# Load RBRP regime
    85→# Usage: rbrp_load
    86→# Prerequisite: RBCC must be kindled (needs RBCC_RBRP_FILE), RBGC must be kindled (zrbrp_kindle uses RBGC patterns)
    87→rbrp_load() {
    88→  local z_rbrp_file="${RBCC_RBRP_FILE}"
    89→  test -f "${z_rbrp_file}" || buc_die "RBRP config not found: ${z_rbrp_file}"
    90→  source "${z_rbrp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRP config: ${z_rbrp_file}"
    91→  zrbrp_kindle
    92→}
    93→
    94→# eof
    95→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle OAuth Regime - Validator Module
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBRO_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbro multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBRO_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbro_*)
    29→
    30→zrbro_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBRO_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbro already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Set defaults for all fields (validate enforces required-ness)
    34→  RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET="${RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET:-}"
    35→  RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN="${RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN:-}"
    36→
    37→  # Detect unexpected RBRO_ variables
    38→  local z_known="RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN"
    39→  ZRBRO_UNEXPECTED=()
    40→  local z_var
    41→  for z_var in $(compgen -v RBRO_); do
    42→    case " ${z_known} " in
    43→      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
    44→      *) ZRBRO_UNEXPECTED+=("${z_var}") ;;
    45→    esac
    46→  done
    47→
    48→  # Build rollup of all RBRO_ variables for passing to scripts/containers
    49→  # CRITICAL SECURITY: mask both secret values
    50→  ZRBRO_ROLLUP=""
    51→  ZRBRO_ROLLUP+="RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET='[REDACTED]' "
    52→  ZRBRO_ROLLUP+="RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN='[REDACTED]'"
    53→
    54→  ZRBRO_KINDLED=1
    55→}
    56→
    57→zrbro_sentinel() {
    58→  test "${ZRBRO_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbro not kindled - call zrbro_kindle first"
    59→}
    60→
    61→# Validate RBRO variables via buv_env_* (dies on first error)
    62→# Prerequisite: kindle must have been called; buv_validation.sh must be sourced
    63→zrbro_validate_fields() {
    64→  zrbro_sentinel
    65→
    66→  # Die on unexpected variables
    67→  if test ${#ZRBRO_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
    68→    buc_die "Unexpected RBRO_ variables: ${ZRBRO_UNEXPECTED[*]}"
    69→  fi
    70→
    71→  # Both credentials are required strings
    72→  buv_env_string RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET 1 512
    73→  buv_env_string RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN 1 512
    74→}
    75→
    76→######################################################################
    77→# Public Functions (rbro_*)
    78→
    79→# Load RBRO from the canonical location (~/.rbw/rbro.env)
    80→rbro_load() {
    81→  local z_rbro_dir="${HOME}/.rbw"
    82→  local z_rbro_file="${z_rbro_dir}/rbro.env"
    83→
    84→  # Check directory and file exist
    85→  test -d "${z_rbro_dir}" || buc_die "RBRO directory missing (~/.rbw) - run rbgp_payor_install"
    86→  test -f "${z_rbro_file}" || buc_die "RBRO credentials missing (~/.rbw/rbro.env) - run rbgp_payor_install"
    87→  test -r "${z_rbro_file}" || buc_die "RBRO file not readable - check permissions"
    88→
    89→  # Source and validate
    90→  source "${z_rbro_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRO credentials"
    91→  zrbro_kindle
    92→  zrbro_validate_fields
    93→}
    94→
    95→# eof
    96→

    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle Authentication Regime - Validator Module
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBRA_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbra multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBRA_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbra_*)
    29→
    30→zrbra_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBRA_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbra already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Set defaults for all fields (validate enforces required-ness)
    34→  RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL:-}"
    35→  RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY:-}"
    36→  RBRA_PROJECT_ID="${RBRA_PROJECT_ID:-}"
    37→  RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC="${RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC:-}"
    38→
    39→  # Detect unexpected RBRA_ variables
    40→  local z_known="RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY RBRA_PROJECT_ID RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC"
    41→  ZRBRA_UNEXPECTED=()
    42→  local z_var
    43→  for z_var in $(compgen -v RBRA_); do
    44→    case " ${z_known} " in
    45→      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
    46→      *) ZRBRA_UNEXPECTED+=("${z_var}") ;;
    47→    esac
    48→  done
    49→
    50→  # Build rollup of all RBRA_ variables for passing to scripts/containers
    51→  # CRITICAL SECURITY: mask RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY
    52→  ZRBRA_ROLLUP=""
    53→  ZRBRA_ROLLUP+="RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL='${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL}' "
    54→  ZRBRA_ROLLUP+="RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY='[REDACTED]' "
    55→  ZRBRA_ROLLUP+="RBRA_PROJECT_ID='${RBRA_PROJECT_ID}' "
    56→  ZRBRA_ROLLUP+="RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC='${RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC}'"
    57→
    58→  ZRBRA_KINDLED=1
    59→}
    60→
    61→zrbra_sentinel() {
    62→  test "${ZRBRA_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbra not kindled - call zrbra_kindle first"
    63→}
    64→
    65→# Validate RBRA variables via buv_env_* (dies on first error)
    66→# Prerequisite: kindle must have been called; buv_validation.sh must be sourced
    67→zrbra_validate_fields() {
    68→  zrbra_sentinel
    69→
    70→  # Die on unexpected variables
    71→  if test ${#ZRBRA_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
    72→    buc_die "Unexpected RBRA_ variables: ${ZRBRA_UNEXPECTED[*]}"
    73→  fi
    74→
    75→  # Core credential fields
    76→  buv_env_string RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL 1 256
    77→  buv_env_string RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY 1 4096
    78→  buv_env_string RBRA_PROJECT_ID 1 64
    79→  buv_env_decimal RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC 300 3600
    80→
    81→  # Additional format validation: client email must match service account pattern
    82→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL}" | grep -qE '\.iam\.gserviceaccount\.com$'; then
    83→    buc_die "RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL does not match service account pattern (*.iam.gserviceaccount.com): '${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL}'"
    84→  fi
    85→
    86→  # Additional format validation: private key must contain PEM key material
    87→  if ! printf '%s' "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY}" | grep -q 'BEGIN'; then
    88→    buc_die "RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY does not contain PEM key material"
    89→  fi
    90→}
    91→
    92→######################################################################
    93→# Public Functions (rbra_*)
    94→
    95→# NO rbra_load() function - RBRA is multi-instance (manifold)
    96→# Loading happens through RBRR references; CLI handles per-file operations
    97→
    98→# eof
    99→

    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle Regime Station - Validator Module
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBRS_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrs multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBRS_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbrs_*)
    29→
    30→zrbrs_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBRS_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrs already kindled"
    32→
    33→  buv_env_string      RBRS_PODMAN_ROOT_DIR         1     64
    34→  buv_env_string      RBRS_VMIMAGE_CACHE_DIR       1     64
    35→  buv_env_string      RBRS_VM_PLATFORM             1     64
    36→
    37→  ZRBRS_KINDLED=1
    38→}
    39→
    40→zrbrs_sentinel() {
    41→  test "${ZRBRS_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrs not kindled - call zrbrs_kindle first"
    42→}
    43→
    44→# eof
    45→

content.text: Excellent. Now let me look at the operational scripts (the ones that do real work - gcloud, docker, etc.) to see whether they call validation. Let me also look at the zipper registry and the constants file.

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBW Zipper - Colophon registry for RBW workbench dispatch
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion guard
    24→test -z "${ZRBZ_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
    25→ZRBZ_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Colophon registry initialization
    29→
    30→# shellcheck disable=SC2034,SC2154
    31→zrbz_kindle() {
    32→  test -z "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbz already kindled"
    33→
    34→  # Verify buz zipper is kindled (CLI furnish must kindle buz first)
    35→  zbuz_sentinel
    36→
    37→  # z_buz_register_colophon set by buz_register (cross-module return channel)
    38→  # Module field is CLI script basename (used by zbuz_exec_lookup)
    39→
    40→  # Payor commands
    41→  buz_register "rbw-PC" "rbgp_cli.sh" "rbgp_depot_create"
    42→  RBZ_CREATE_DEPOT="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    43→  buz_register "rbw-PI" "rbgp_cli.sh" "rbgp_payor_install"
    44→  RBZ_PAYOR_INSTALL="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    45→  buz_register "rbw-PD" "rbgp_cli.sh" "rbgp_depot_destroy"
    46→  RBZ_DESTROY_DEPOT="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    47→  buz_register "rbw-PE" "rbgm_cli.sh" "rbgm_payor_establish"
    48→  RBZ_PAYOR_ESTABLISH="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    49→  buz_register "rbw-PG" "rbgp_cli.sh" "rbgp_governor_reset"
    50→  RBZ_GOVERNOR_RESET="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    51→  buz_register "rbw-PR" "rbgm_cli.sh" "rbgm_payor_refresh"
    52→  RBZ_PAYOR_REFRESH="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    53→  buz_register "rbw-QB" "rbgm_cli.sh" "rbgm_quota_build"
    54→  RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    55→
    56→  # General depot operations
    57→  buz_register "rbw-ld" "rbgp_cli.sh" "rbgp_depot_list"
    58→  RBZ_LIST_DEPOT="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    59→
    60→  # Governor commands
    61→  buz_register "rbw-GR" "rbgg_cli.sh" "rbgg_create_retriever"
    62→  RBZ_CREATE_RETRIEVER="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    63→  buz_register "rbw-GD" "rbgg_cli.sh" "rbgg_create_director"
    64→  RBZ_CREATE_DIRECTOR="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    65→
    66→  # Admin commands
    67→  buz_register "rbw-ps" "rbgm_cli.sh" "rbgm_payor_establish"
    68→  RBZ_ADMIN_ESTABLISH="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    69→  buz_register "rbw-Gl" "rbgg_cli.sh" "rbgg_list_service_accounts"
    70→  RBZ_LIST_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    71→  buz_register "rbw-GS" "rbgg_cli.sh" "rbgg_delete_service_account"
    72→  RBZ_DELETE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    73→
    74→  # Ark commands (paired -image + -about artifacts)
    75→  buz_register "rbw-aA" "rbf_cli.sh" "rbf_abjure"
    76→  RBZ_ABJURE_ARK="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    77→  buz_register "rbw-ab" "rbf_cli.sh" "rbf_beseech"
    78→  RBZ_BESEECH_ARK="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    79→  buz_register "rbw-aC" "rbf_cli.sh" "rbf_build"
    80→  RBZ_CONJURE_ARK="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    81→  buz_register "rbw-as" "rbf_cli.sh" "rbf_summon"
    82→  RBZ_SUMMON_ARK="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    83→
    84→  # Image commands (single artifact)
    85→  buz_register "rbw-iB" "rbf_cli.sh" "rbf_build"
    86→  RBZ_BUILD_IMAGE="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    87→  buz_register "rbw-iD" "rbf_cli.sh" "rbf_delete"
    88→  RBZ_DELETE_IMAGE="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    89→  buz_register "rbw-il" "rbf_cli.sh" "rbf_list"
    90→  RBZ_LIST_IMAGES="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    91→  buz_register "rbw-ir" "rbf_cli.sh" "rbf_retrieve"
    92→  RBZ_RETRIEVE_IMAGE="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    93→
    94→  # Nameplate regime operations
    95→  buz_register "rbw-rnr" "rbrn_cli.sh" "render"
    96→  RBZ_RENDER_NAMEPLATE="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    97→  buz_register "rbw-rnv" "rbrn_cli.sh" "validate"
    98→  RBZ_VALIDATE_NAMEPLATE="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
    99→
   100→  # Vessel regime operations
   101→  buz_register "rbw-rvr" "rbrv_cli.sh" "render"
   102→  RBZ_RENDER_VESSEL="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   103→  buz_register "rbw-rvv" "rbrv_cli.sh" "validate"
   104→  RBZ_VALIDATE_VESSEL="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   105→
   106→  # Repo regime operations
   107→  buz_register "rbw-rrr" "rbrr_cli.sh" "render"
   108→  RBZ_RENDER_REPO="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   109→  buz_register "rbw-rrv" "rbrr_cli.sh" "validate"
   110→  RBZ_VALIDATE_REPO="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   111→  buz_register "rbw-rrg" "rbrr_cli.sh" "refresh_gcb_pins"
   112→  RBZ_REFRESH_GCB_PINS="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   113→
   114→  # Payor regime operations
   115→  buz_register "rbw-rpr" "rbrp_cli.sh" "render"
   116→  RBZ_RENDER_PAYOR="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   117→  buz_register "rbw-rpv" "rbrp_cli.sh" "validate"
   118→  RBZ_VALIDATE_PAYOR="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   119→
   120→  # OAuth regime operations
   121→  buz_register "rbw-ror" "rbro_cli.sh" "render"
   122→  RBZ_RENDER_OAUTH="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   123→  buz_register "rbw-rov" "rbro_cli.sh" "validate"
   124→  RBZ_VALIDATE_OAUTH="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   125→
   126→  # Station regime operations
   127→  buz_register "rbw-rsr" "rbrs_cli.sh" "render"
   128→  RBZ_RENDER_STATION="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   129→  buz_register "rbw-rsv" "rbrs_cli.sh" "validate"
   130→  RBZ_VALIDATE_STATION="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   131→
   132→  # Auth regime operations
   133→  buz_register "rbw-rar" "rbra_cli.sh" "render"
   134→  RBZ_RENDER_AUTH="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   135→  buz_register "rbw-rav" "rbra_cli.sh" "validate"
   136→  RBZ_VALIDATE_AUTH="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   137→  buz_register "rbw-ral" "rbra_cli.sh" "list"
   138→  RBZ_LIST_AUTH="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   139→
   140→  # Cross-nameplate operations
   141→  buz_register "rbw-ni" "rbrn_cli.sh" "survey"
   142→  RBZ_SURVEY_NAMEPLATES="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   143→  buz_register "rbw-nv" "rbrn_cli.sh" "audit"
   144→  RBZ_AUDIT_NAMEPLATES="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   145→
   146→  # Test operations (module is testbench, command is colophon)
   147→  buz_register "rbw-ta"  "rbtb_testbench.sh" "rbw-ta"
   148→  RBZ_TEST_ALL="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   149→  buz_register "rbw-ts"  "rbtb_testbench.sh" "rbw-ts"
   150→  RBZ_TEST_SUITE="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   151→  buz_register "rbw-to"  "rbtb_testbench.sh" "rbw-to"
   152→  RBZ_TEST_ONE="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   153→  buz_register "rbw-tn"  "rbtb_testbench.sh" "rbw-tn"
   154→  RBZ_TEST_NAMEPLATE="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   155→  buz_register "rbw-trg" "rbtb_testbench.sh" "rbw-trg"
   156→  RBZ_TEST_REGIME="${z_buz_register_colophon}"
   157→
   158→  ZRBZ_KINDLED=1
   159→}
   160→
   161→######################################################################
   162→# Internal sentinel
   163→
   164→zrbz_sentinel() {
   165→  test "${ZRBZ_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbz not kindled - call zrbz_kindle first"
   166→}
   167→
   168→# eof
   169→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
    25→test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    26→ZRBGC_SOURCED=1
    27→
    28→######################################################################
    29→# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)
    30→
    31→zrbgc_kindle() {
    32→  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"
    33→
    34→  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
    35→  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
    36→  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
    37→  RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
    38→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
    39→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
    40→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
    41→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
    42→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
    43→  RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
    44→  RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX=10
    45→
    46→  # Global resource validation patterns
    47→  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    48→  # Depot:  rbwg-d-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    49→  # Bucket: rbwg-b-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
    50→  RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    51→  RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    52→  RBGC_GLOBAL_BUCKET_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
    53→
    54→  # Basic Configuration
    55→  RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
    56→  RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
    57→  RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"
    58→
    59→  # Service Account Prefixes
    60→  RBGC_GOVERNOR_PREFIX="governor"
    61→  RBGC_MASON_PREFIX="mason"
    62→  RBGC_DIRECTOR_PREFIX="director"
    63→  RBGC_RETRIEVER_PREFIX="retriever"
    64→
    65→  # Timeouts
    66→  RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
    67→  RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
    68→
    69→  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
    70→  RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
    71→  RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
    72→  RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
    73→  RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
    74→  RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
    75→  RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
    76→  RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
    77→  RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
    78→  RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
    79→  RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"
    80→
    81→  # OAuth Scopes
    82→  RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"
    83→
    84→  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
    85→  RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
    86→  RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
    87→  RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
    88→
    89→  # Email/Domain Assembly
    90→  RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"
    91→
    92→  # API Version Paths
    93→  RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
    94→  RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
    95→  RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
    96→  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
    97→  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
    98→  RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
    99→  RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
   100→  RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
   101→  RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
   102→  RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
   103→
   104→  # REST Path Fragments
   105→  RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
   106→  RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
   107→  RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
   108→  RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
   109→  RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"
   110→
   111→  # REST Operation Suffixes
   112→  RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
   113→  RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
   114→  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
   115→  RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"
   116→
   117→  # Operation Prefixes
   118→  RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"
   119→
   120→  # Ark Artifact Suffixes
   121→  RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE="-image"
   122→  RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT="-about"
   123→
   124→  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
   125→  RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"
   126→
   127→
   128→  # Canonical Role IDs
   129→  RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
   130→  RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
   131→  RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
   132→  RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"
   133→
   134→  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
   135→  RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"
   136→
   137→  # Cloud Resource Manager - Liens API
   138→  RBGC_API_CRM_LIST_LIENS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
   139→  RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
   140→
   141→  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)
   142→  RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS="${RBGC_API_BASE_GCS}/b"
   143→
   144→  ZRBGC_KINDLED=1
   145→}
   146→
   147→zrbgc_sentinel() {
   148→  test "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgc not kindled - call zrbgc_kindle first"
   149→}
   150→
   151→######################################################################
   152→# External Functions (rbgc_*)
   153→
   154→# GCB default pool machine type to vCPU mapping.
   155→#
   156→# Provenance (verified 2026-02-13):
   157→#   Enum names from Cloud Build API BuildOptions.MachineType:
   158→#     https://cloud.google.com/dotnet/docs/reference/Google.Cloud.CloudBuild.V1/latest/Google.Cloud.CloudBuild.V1.BuildOptions.Types.MachineType
   159→#   That reference gives enum names and CPU counts for most types but
   160→#   describes UNSPECIFIED only as "Standard machine type" without a
   161→#   vCPU count.
   162→#
   163→#   The UNSPECIFIED=2 vCPU value was inferred from:
   164→#     1. Google web search result stating default is e2-standard-2 (2 vCPU)
   165→#     2. Empirical: with 10-CPU quota, two UNSPECIFIED builds started
   166→#        concurrently (impossible if >=6 vCPU each)
   167→#     3. Consistent with project's own RBRR comment and 5-concurrent
   168→#        builds observed at 10-CPU quota
   169→#   No single authoritative Google document was found that explicitly
   170→#   maps UNSPECIFIED to a vCPU count for the default pool.
   171→#
   172→# If Google adds new machine types, this function will hard-fail on
   173→# the unknown value, forcing an update here.
   174→rbgc_gcb_machine_vcpus_capture() {
   175→  zrbgc_sentinel
   176→  local z_machine_type="$1"
   177→  case "${z_machine_type}" in
   178→    UNSPECIFIED)    echo 2  ;;
   179→    E2_MEDIUM)      echo 1  ;;
   180→    E2_HIGHCPU_8)   echo 8  ;;
   181→    E2_HIGHCPU_32)  echo 32 ;;
   182→    N1_HIGHCPU_8)   echo 8  ;;
   183→    N1_HIGHCPU_32)  echo 32 ;;
   184→    *) buc_die "Unknown GCB machine type: ${z_machine_type} — update rbgc_gcb_machine_vcpus_capture" ;;
   185→  esac
   186→}
   187→
   188→# eof
   189→
   190→

    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBGA_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbga multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBGA_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbga_*)
    29→
    30→zrbga_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBGA_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbga already kindled"
    32→
    33→  test -n "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
    34→  test   "${#RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"
    35→
    36→  buc_log_args "Ensure dependencies are kindled first"
    37→  zrbgc_sentinel
    38→  zrbgo_sentinel
    39→  zrbgu_sentinel
    40→  zrbgi_sentinel
    41→
    42→  ZRBGA_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_"
    43→  ZRBGA_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGA_PREFIX}empty.json"
    44→  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGA_EMPTY_JSON}"
    45→
    46→  # Infix values for HTTP operations
    47→  ZRBGA_INFIX_CREATE_REPO="create_repo"
    48→  ZRBGA_INFIX_VERIFY_REPO="verify_repo"
    49→  ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO="delete_repo"
    50→  ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO="get_repo"
    51→  ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_GET="repo_iam_get"
    52→  ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET="repo_iam_set"
    53→
    54→  ZRBGA_KINDLED=1
    55→}
    56→
    57→zrbga_sentinel() {
    58→  test "${ZRBGA_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbga not kindled - call zrbga_kindle first"
    59→}

    62→# External Functions (rbga_*)
    63→
    64→rbga_repo_create() {
    65→  zrbga_sentinel
    66→
    67→  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
    68→  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
    69→  local z_format="${3:-DOCKER}"
    70→
    71→  buc_doc_brief "Create an Artifact Registry repository"
    72→  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to create"
    73→  buc_doc_param "location" "Location for the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
    74→  buc_doc_param "format" "Repository format (optional, defaults to DOCKER)"
    75→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    76→
    77→  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
    78→  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
    79→
    80→  buc_step "Creating Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
    81→
    82→  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
    83→  local z_token
    84→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
    85→
    86→  local z_parent="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}"
    87→  local z_resource="${z_parent}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
    88→  local z_create_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_parent}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}?repositoryId=${z_repo_name}"
    89→  local z_create_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_create_repo_body.json"
    90→
    91→  jq -n --arg format "${z_format}" '{format: $format}' > "${z_create_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build create-repo body"
    92→
    93→  buc_step "Create ${z_format} format repository"
    94→  rbgu_http_json_lro_ok                                              \
    95→    "Create Artifact Registry repo"                                  \
    96→    "${z_token}"                                                     \
    97→    "${z_create_url}"                                                \
    98→    "${ZRBGA_INFIX_CREATE_REPO}"                                     \
    99→    "${z_create_body}"                                               \
   100→    ".name"                                                          \
   101→    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}"   \
   102→    "${RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL}"                                       \
   103→    "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"                               \
   104→    "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
   105→
   106→  buc_success "Repository ${z_repo_name} created in ${z_location}"
   107→}

   109→rbga_repo_get() {
   110→  zrbga_sentinel
   111→
   112→  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
   113→  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
   114→
   115→  buc_doc_brief "Get Artifact Registry repository details"
   116→  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to retrieve"
   117→  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
   118→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   119→
   120→  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
   121→  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
   122→
   123→  buc_step "Getting Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   124→
   125→  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   126→  local z_token
   127→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   128→
   129→  local z_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
   130→  local z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}"
   131→
   132→  buc_step 'Get repository via REST API'
   133→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}"
   134→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Get repository" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}" 404 "not found"
   135→
   136→  if rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}" | grep -q "404"; then
   137→    buc_info "Repository not found: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   138→    return 1
   139→  fi
   140→
   141→  buc_log_args 'Verify repository format'
   142→  local z_format
   143→  z_format=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_GET_REPO}" '.format') || z_format="UNKNOWN"
   144→  buc_success "Repository found: ${z_repo_name} (format: ${z_format}) in ${z_location}"
   145→  return 0
   146→}

   148→rbga_repo_set_iam() {
   149→  zrbga_sentinel
   150→
   151→  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
   152→  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
   153→  local z_policy_json="${3:-}"
   154→
   155→  buc_doc_brief "Set IAM policy on an Artifact Registry repository"
   156→  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository"
   157→  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
   158→  buc_doc_param "policy_json" "IAM policy JSON (from file or string)"
   159→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   160→
   161→  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
   162→  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
   163→  test -n "${z_policy_json}" || buc_die "Policy JSON required"
   164→
   165→  buc_step "Setting IAM policy on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   166→
   167→  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   168→  local z_token
   169→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   170→
   171→  local z_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
   172→  local z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:setIamPolicy"
   173→  local z_policy_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbga_repo_set_iam.json"
   174→
   175→  if test -f "${z_policy_json}"; then
   176→    jq -n --slurpfile policy "${z_policy_json}" '{ policy: $policy[0] }' > "${z_policy_file}"
   177→  else
   178→    jq -n --argjson policy "${z_policy_json}" '{ policy: $policy }' > "${z_policy_file}"
   179→  fi
   180→
   181→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" \
   182→                                  "${ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET}" "${z_policy_file}"
   183→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Set repository IAM policy" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_REPO_IAM_SET}"
   184→
   185→  buc_success "IAM policy set on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   186→}
   187→
   188→rbga_repo_add_iam_role() {
   189→  zrbga_sentinel
   190→
   191→  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
   192→  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
   193→  local z_member="${3:-}"
   194→  local z_role="${4:-}"
   195→
   196→  buc_doc_brief "Add IAM role to a member on an Artifact Registry repository"
   197→  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository"
   198→  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
   199→  buc_doc_param "member" "Member to grant role to (serviceAccount:email or user:email)"
   200→  buc_doc_param "role" "Role to grant (e.g., roles/artifactregistry.reader)"
   201→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   202→
   203→  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
   204→  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
   205→  test -n "${z_member}" || buc_die "Member required"
   206→  test -n "${z_role}" || buc_die "Role required"
   207→
   208→  buc_step "Adding IAM role ${z_role} to ${z_member} on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   209→
   210→  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   211→  local z_token
   212→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   213→
   214→  # Extract email from member if it's in serviceAccount:email format
   215→  local z_account_email="${z_member}"
   216→  if [[ "${z_member}" =~ ^serviceAccount:(.+)$ ]]; then
   217→    z_account_email="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
   218→  fi
   219→
   220→  buc_log_args 'Use rbgi_add_repo_iam_role'
   221→  rbgi_add_repo_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_account_email}" "${z_location}" "${z_repo_name}" "${z_role}"
   222→
   223→  buc_success "Added IAM role ${z_role} to ${z_member} on repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   224→}

   226→rbga_repo_delete() {
   227→  zrbga_sentinel
   228→
   229→  local z_repo_name="${1:-}"
   230→  local z_location="${2:-${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}}"
   231→
   232→  buc_doc_brief "Delete an Artifact Registry repository"
   233→  buc_doc_param "repo_name" "Name of the repository to delete"
   234→  buc_doc_param "location" "Location of the repository (optional, defaults to RBGC_GAR_LOCATION)"
   235→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   236→
   237→  test -n "${z_repo_name}" || buc_die "Repository name required"
   238→  test -n "${z_location}" || buc_die "Location required"
   239→
   240→  buc_step "Deleting Artifact Registry repository: ${z_repo_name} in ${z_location}"
   241→
   242→  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   243→  local z_token
   244→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   245→
   246→  local z_resource="projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS}/${z_location}${RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES}/${z_repo_name}"
   247→  buc_log_args "Delete Artifact Registry repo '${z_repo_name}' in ${z_location}"
   248→  local z_delete_code
   249→  rbgu_http_json "DELETE"                                                           \
   250→    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}"    \
   251→                            "${z_token}" "${ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO}"
   252→  z_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO}") || z_delete_code="000"
   253→  case "${z_delete_code}" in
   254→    200|204) buc_success "Repository ${z_repo_name} deleted" ;;
   255→    404)     buc_info "Repository ${z_repo_name} not found (already deleted)" ;;
   256→    *)
   257→      local z_err
   258→      z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGA_INFIX_DELETE_REPO}" '.error.message') || z_err="Unknown error"
   259→      buc_die "Failed to delete repository: ${z_err}"
   260→      ;;
   261→  esac
   262→}

    42→
    43→  # Infix values for HTTP operations

    71→######################################################################
    72→# OAuth Authentication Functions (zrbgp_oauth_*)
    73→
    74→zrbgp_refresh_capture() {
    75→  zrbgp_sentinel
    76→
    77→  buc_log_args "Loading RBRO credentials for OAuth token refresh"
    78→  local z_rbro_file="${HOME}/.rbw/rbro.env"
    79→  test -d "${HOME}/.rbw" || buc_die "RBRO directory missing - run rbgp_payor_install"
    80→  test -f "${z_rbro_file}" || buc_die "RBRO credentials missing - run rbgp_payor_install"
    81→  
    82→  # Check file permissions (readable and writable by owner)
    83→  if [ ! -r "${z_rbro_file}" ] || [ ! -w "${z_rbro_file}" ]; then
    84→    buc_die "RBRO file not readable/writable - check permissions and ownership"
    85→  fi
    86→  
    87→  # Source RBRO credentials
    88→  # shellcheck source=/dev/null
    89→  source "${z_rbro_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRO credentials"
    90→  
    91→  test -n "${RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET:-}" || buc_die "RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET missing from ${z_rbro_file}"
    92→  test -n "${RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN:-}" || buc_die "RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN missing from ${z_rbro_file}"
    93→  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID not set in environment"
    94→
    95→  buc_log_args "Exchanging refresh token for access token"
    96→
    97→  # Build request and pipe to curl - secrets never touch disk
    98→  local z_response
    99→  z_response=$(jq -n \
   100→    --arg refresh_token "${RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN}" \
   101→    --arg client_id "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID}" \
   102→    --arg client_secret "${RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET}" \
   103→    --arg grant_type "refresh_token" \
   104→    '{
   105→      refresh_token: $refresh_token,
   106→      client_id: $client_id,
   107→      client_secret: $client_secret,
   108→      grant_type: $grant_type
   109→    }' | curl -s -X POST \
   110→      -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
   111→      -d @- \
   112→      "https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token") || buc_die "Failed to execute OAuth refresh request"
   113→
   114→  # Check for error in response
   115→  local z_error
   116→  z_error=$(jq -r '.error // empty' <<<"${z_response}")
   117→  if test -n "${z_error}"; then
   118→    local z_error_desc
   119→    z_error_desc=$(jq -r '.error_description // .error // "Unknown error"' <<<"${z_response}")
   120→    buc_die "OAuth credentials expired or invalid - run rbgp_payor_oauth_refresh: ${z_error_desc}"
   121→  fi
   122→
   123→  local z_access_token
   124→  z_access_token=$(jq -r '.access_token // empty' <<<"${z_response}")
   125→  test -n "${z_access_token}" || buc_die "OAuth response missing access_token"
   126→
   127→  echo "${z_access_token}"
   128→}
   129→
   130→# RBTOE: Payor OAuth Authentication Pattern
   131→# Establishes Payor OAuth context by loading RBRO credentials and obtaining access token
   132→zrbgp_authenticate_capture() {
   133→  zrbgp_sentinel
   134→  
   135→  buc_log_args "Establishing Payor OAuth authentication context"
   136→  
   137→  # Load RBRO credentials
   138→  rbgu_rbro_load
   139→  
   140→  # Load RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID from environment
   141→  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID not set in environment"
   142→  
   143→  # Exchange refresh token for access token
   144→  local z_access_token
   145→  z_access_token=$(zrbgp_refresh_capture) || buc_die "Failed to exchange OAuth refresh token"
   146→  
   147→  test -n "${z_access_token}" || buc_die "Empty access token from OAuth exchange"
   148→  
   149→  buc_log_args "Payor OAuth authentication successful"
   150→  echo "${z_access_token}"
   151→}

   153→zrbgp_depot_list_update() {
   154→  zrbgp_sentinel
   155→
   156→  buc_log_args "Updating depot project tracking in RBRP configuration"
   157→
   158→  # Get OAuth access token
   159→  local z_access_token
   160→  z_access_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate for depot list update"
   161→
   162→  # Query active depot projects (CRM v1 allows listing accessible projects without parent)
   163→  # Using v1 instead of v3 which requires parent parameter
   164→  local z_list_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/projects"
   165→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_list_url}" "${z_access_token}" "depot_list_tracking"
   166→
   167→  # Non-blocking: if query fails, just log and continue (normal on first install with no projects)
   168→  if ! rbgu_http_require_ok "Query depot projects" "depot_list_tracking" 2>/dev/null; then
   169→    buc_log_args "Depot project list query skipped (expected on first install or API access restrictions)"
   170→    return 0
   171→  fi
   172→  
   173→  # Extract and validate depot project IDs
   174→  local z_depot_ids=""
   175→  local z_project_count
   176→  z_project_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_list_tracking" '.projects // [] | length') || z_project_count=0
   177→  
   178→  if [ "${z_project_count}" -gt 0 ]; then
   179→    local z_index=0
   180→    while [ "${z_index}" -lt "${z_project_count}" ]; do
   181→      local z_project_id
   182→      z_project_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_list_tracking" ".projects[${z_index}].projectId") || continue
   183→      
   184→      # Validate depot project ID pattern (global namespace)
   185→      if printf '%s' "${z_project_id}" | grep -qE "${RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX}"; then
   186→        z_depot_ids="${z_depot_ids} ${z_project_id}"
   187→      else
   188→        buc_log_args "Warning: Skipping project with invalid depot pattern: ${z_project_id}"
   189→      fi
   190→      
   191→      z_index=$((z_index + 1))
   192→    done
   193→  fi
   194→  
   195→  # Update RBRP configuration
   196→  # Note: This would normally update rbrp.env file
   197→  # For now, we'll export to environment and log the result
   198→  buc_log_args "Found ${z_project_count} depot projects, ${z_depot_ids:+ $(($(printf '%s' "${z_depot_ids}" | wc -w))):+0} valid"
   199→
   200→  return 0
   201→}

   203→######################################################################
   204→# External Functions (rbgp_*)
   205→
   206→zrbgp_billing_attach() {
   207→  zrbgp_sentinel
   208→
   209→  local z_billing_account="${1:-}"
   210→
   211→  buc_doc_brief "Attach a billing account to the project"
   212→  buc_doc_param "billing_account" "Billing account ID to attach"
   213→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   214→

   228→    }' > "${z_billing_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build billing attach body"

   315→######################################################################
   316→# Capture: list required services that are NOT enabled (blank = all enabled)
   317→zrbgp_required_apis_missing_capture() {
   318→  zrbgp_sentinel
   319→
   320→  local z_token="${1:-}"
   321→  test -n "${z_token}" || { echo ""; return 1; }
   322→
   323→  local z_missing=""
   324→  local z_api=""
   325→  local z_service=""
   326→  local z_infix=""
   327→  local z_state=""
   328→  local z_code=""
   329→
   330→  for z_api in                       \
   331→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_CRM}"      \
   332→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_GAR}"      \
   333→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_IAM}"      \
   334→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_BUILD}"    \
   335→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_ANALYSIS}" \
   336→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_STORAGE}"
   337→  do
   338→    z_service="${z_api##*/}"
   339→    z_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_API_CHECK}_${z_service}"
   340→
   341→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_api}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" || true
   342→
   343→    buc_log_args 'If we cannot even read an HTTP code file, that is a processing failure.'
   344→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || z_code=""
   345→    test -n "${z_code}" || return 1
   346→
   347→    if test "${z_code}" = "200"; then
   348→      z_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".state") || z_state=""
   349→      test "${z_state}" = "ENABLED" || z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
   350→    else
   351→      buc_log_args 'Any non-200 (403/404/5xx/etc) => treat as NOT enabled'
   352→      z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
   353→    fi
   354→  done
   355→
   356→  printf '%s' "${z_missing# }"
   357→}

   376→zrbgp_create_gcs_bucket() {
   377→  zrbgp_sentinel
   378→
   379→  local z_token="${1}"
   380→  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
   381→
   382→  buc_log_args 'Create bucket request JSON for '"${z_bucket_name}"
   383→  local z_bucket_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_bucket_create_req.json"
   384→  jq -n --arg name "${z_bucket_name}" --arg location "${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}" '
   385→    {
   386→      name: $name,
   387→      location: $location,
   388→      storageClass: "STANDARD",
   389→      lifecycle: { rule: [ { action: { type: "Delete" }, condition: { age: 1 } } ] }
   390→    }' > "${z_bucket_req}" || buc_die "Failed to create bucket request JSON"
   391→
   392→  buc_log_args 'Send bucket creation request'
   393→  local z_code
   394→  local z_err
   395→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS}?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_token}" \
   396→                                  "${ZRBGP_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}" "${z_bucket_req}"
   397→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGP_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}") || buc_die "Bad bucket creation HTTP code"
   398→  z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGP_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}" '.error.message') || z_err="HTTP ${z_code}"
   399→
   400→  case "${z_code}" in
   401→    200|201) buc_info "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} created";                         return 0 ;;
   402→    409)     buc_die  "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} already exists (pristine-state violation)" ;;
   403→    *)       buc_die  "Failed to create bucket: ${z_err}"                                 ;;
   404→  esac
   405→}
