     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle Google IAM - Implementation
    20→
    21→# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    22→# Operational Invariants (RBGI is single writer; 409 is fatal)
    23→#
    24→# - Single admin actor: All RBGI operations are executed by a single admin
    25→#   identity. There are no concurrent writers in the same project.
    26→# - Pristine-state expectation: RBGI init/creation flows assume the project
    27→#   is pristine for the resources they manage. If a resource "already exists"
    28→#   (HTTP 409), that's treated as state drift or prior manual activity.
    29→# - Policy: All HTTP 409 Conflict responses are fatal (buc_die). We do not
    30→#   treat 409 as idempotent success anywhere in RBGI.
    31→#   If you see a 409, resolve state drift first (destroy/reset), then rerun.
    32→# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    33→
    34→set -euo pipefail
    35→
    36→# Multiple inclusion detection
    37→test -z "${ZRBGI_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgi multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    38→ZRBGI_SOURCED=1
    39→
    40→######################################################################
    41→# Internal Functions (zrbgi_*)
    42→
    43→zrbgi_kindle() {
    44→  test -z "${ZRBGI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgi already kindled"
    45→
    46→  # Validate dependencies
    47→  buv_dir_exists "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
    48→
    49→  # Ensure dependencies are kindled
    50→  zrbgc_sentinel
    51→  zrbgu_sentinel
    52→
    53→  # Module prefix for temp files
    54→  ZRBGI_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_"
    55→  ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}empty.json"
    56→  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON}"
    57→
    58→  # Infix values for IAM operations
    59→  ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE="role"
    60→  ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET="role_set"
    61→  ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE="repo_role"
    62→  ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET="repo_role_set"
    63→  ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY="sa_iamverify"
    64→  ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_POLICY="repo_policy"
    65→  ZRBGI_INFIX_RPOLICY_SET="repo_policy_set"
    66→  ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM="bucket_iam"
    67→  ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM_SET="bucket_iam_set"
    68→
    69→  ZRBGI_POSTFIX_JSON="_i_resp.json"
    70→
    71→  ZRBGI_KINDLED=1
    72→}
    73→
    74→zrbgi_sentinel() {
    75→  test "${ZRBGI_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgi not kindled - call zrbgi_kindle first"
    76→}
    77→
    78→######################################################################
    79→# External Functions (rbgi_*)
    80→
    81→# Add a project-scoped IAM role binding with optimistic concurrency and strong read-back.
    82→rbgi_add_project_iam_role() {
    83→  zrbgi_sentinel
    84→
    85→  local z_token="${1:-}"
    86→  local z_label="${2:-}"
    87→  local z_resource="${3:-}"  # resource_base: Base resource URL
    88→  local z_role="${4:-}"
    89→  local z_member="${5:-}"
    90→  local z_parent_infix="${6:-}"
    91→
    92→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token required"
    93→  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
    94→
    95→  local z_resource_path="${z_resource#/}"  # strip leading slash if present
    96→  local z_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/${z_resource_path}"
    97→  local z_get_url="${z_base}${RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
    98→  local z_set_url="${z_base}${RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
    99→
   100→  test -n "${z_resource}" || buc_die "resource required"
   101→  test -n "${z_role}"     || buc_die "role required"
   102→  test -n "${z_member}"   || buc_die "member required"
   103→
   104→  buc_log_args "${z_label}: add ${z_member} to ${z_role}"
   105→
   106→  buc_log_args '1) GET policy (v3)'
   107→  buc_log_args "GET_POLICY_URL_DEBUG z_resource:${z_resource} z_get_url:${z_get_url}"
   108→  local z_get_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_get_body.json"
   109→  local z_get_infix="${z_parent_infix}-get"
   110→  printf '%s\n' '{"options":{"requestedPolicyVersion":3}}' > "${z_get_body}"
   111→  rbgu_http_json_ok "${z_label} (get policy)" "${z_token}" "POST" \
   112→    "${z_get_url}" "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_body}"
   113→
   114→  buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
   115→  local z_etag=""
   116→  z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing etag"
   117→  test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty etag"
   118→
   119→  buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
   120→
   121→  buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON in temp (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
   122→  local z_new_policy_json=""
   123→  z_new_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" "${z_role}" "${z_member}" "${z_etag}") \
   124→    || buc_die "Failed to compose policy JSON"
   125→
   126→  local z_set_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_set_body.json"
   127→  printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_new_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}"
   128→
   129→  buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409/412 by policy)'
   130→  local z_elapsed=0
   131→  local z_set_infix=""
   132→  while :; do
   133→    z_set_infix="${z_parent_infix}-set-${z_elapsed}s"
   134→    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"
   135→
   136→    local z_code=""
   137→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code"
   138→    case "${z_code}" in
   139→      200)                 break ;;
   140→      412)                 buc_die "${z_label}: precondition failed (etag mismatch)"    ;;
   141→      429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_code} at ${z_elapsed}s; retry"   ;;
   142→      409)                 buc_die "${z_label}: HTTP 409 Conflict (fatal by invariant)" ;;
   143→      *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label} (set policy)" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
   144→    esac
   145→
   146→    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" && buc_die "${z_label}: timeout setting policy"
   147→    sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
   148→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
   149→  done
   150→
   151→  buc_log_args '4) Verify membership within bounded wait'
   152→  z_elapsed=0
   153→  while :; do
   154→    local z_verify_infix="${z_parent_infix}-verify-${z_elapsed}s"
   155→    rbgu_http_json_ok "${z_label} (verify)" "${z_token}" "POST" \
   156→                       "${z_get_url}" "${z_verify_infix}" "${z_get_body}"
   157→
   158→    if rbgu_role_member_exists_predicate "${z_verify_infix}" "${z_role}" "${z_member}"; then
   159→      buc_log_args "Observed ${z_role} for ${z_member}"
   160→
   161→      buc_log_args "Post-set etag $(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_verify_infix}" ".etag" 2>/dev/null || echo "")"
   162→
   163→      return 0
   164→    fi
   165→
   166→    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" && buc_die "${z_label}: verify timeout"
   167→    sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
   168→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
   169→  done
   170→}
   171→
   172→rbgi_add_repo_iam_role() {
   173→  zrbgi_sentinel
   174→
   175→  local z_token="${1:-}"
   176→  local z_project_id="${2:-}"
   177→  local z_account_email="${3:-}"
   178→  local z_location="${4:-}"
   179→  local z_repository="${5:-}"
   180→  local z_role="${6:-}"
   181→
   182→  test -n "${z_token}"         || buc_die "Token required"
   183→  test -n "${z_project_id}"    || buc_die "Project ID required"
   184→  test -n "${z_account_email}" || buc_die "Service account email required"
   185→  test -n "${z_location}"      || buc_die "Location is required"
   186→  test -n "${z_repository}"    || buc_die "Repository is required"
   187→  test -n "${z_role}"          || buc_die "Role is required"
   188→
   189→  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
   190→
   191→  local z_resource="projects/${z_project_id}/locations/${z_location}/repositories/${z_repository}"
   192→  local z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:getIamPolicy"
   193→  local z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:setIamPolicy"
   194→
   195→  buc_log_args 'Adding repo-scoped IAM role' \
   196→               " ${z_role} to ${z_account_email} on ${z_location}/${z_repository}"
   197→
   198→  buc_log_args 'Get current repo IAM policy'
   199→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" \
   200→                                      "${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE}" "${ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON}"
   201→
   202→  local z_get_code
   203→  z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE}") || z_get_code=""
   204→  if test "${z_get_code}" = "404"; then
   205→    # 404 means repo exists but has no IAM policy yet - this is normal for new repos
   206→    buc_log_args 'No IAM policy exists yet (404), initializing with empty bindings'
   207→    rbgu_write_vanilla_json "${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE}"
   208→  else
   209→    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get repo IAM policy" "${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE}"
   210→  fi
   211→
   212→  buc_log_args 'Update repo IAM policy'
   213→  local z_updated_policy_json=""
   214→  z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE}" \
   215→    "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "") \
   216→    || buc_die "Failed to update policy JSON"
   217→
   218→  buc_log_args 'Set updated repo IAM policy'
   219→  local z_repo_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_repo_set_policy_body.json"
   220→  printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_repo_set_body}" \
   221→    || buc_die "Failed to build repo setIamPolicy body"
   222→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" \
   223→                                             "${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET}" "${z_repo_set_body}"
   224→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Set repo IAM policy" "${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET}"
   225→
   226→  buc_log_args 'Successfully added repo-scoped role' "${z_role}"
   227→}
   228→
   229→rbgi_add_sa_iam_role() {
   230→  zrbgi_sentinel
   231→
   232→  local z_token="${1:-}"
   233→  local z_target_sa_email="${2:-}"
   234→  local z_member_email="${3:-}"  # email only; function adds serviceAccount: prefix
   235→  local z_role="${4:-}"
   236→
   237→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token required"
   238→
   239→  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
   240→  buc_log_args "Granting ${z_role} on SA ${z_target_sa_email} to ${z_member_email}"
   241→
   242→  # Caller must have already primed Cloud Build if this is the runtime SA.
   243→  # We do a hard existence check and crash if not accessible.
   244→
   245→  buc_log_args 'Verify target SA exists'
   246→  local z_target_encoded
   247→  z_target_encoded=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_target_sa_email}") \
   248→    || buc_die "Failed to encode SA email"
   249→
   250→  local z_verify_code
   251→  rbgu_http_json "GET" \
   252→    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/-/serviceAccounts/${z_target_encoded}" \
   253→                            "${z_token}" "${ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY}"
   254→  z_verify_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY}") || z_verify_code=""
   255→  test "${z_verify_code}" = "200" || \
   256→    buc_die "Target service account not accessible: ${z_target_sa_email} (HTTP ${z_verify_code})"
   257→
   258→  local z_sa_resource="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/-/serviceAccounts/${z_target_encoded}"
   259→
   260→  buc_log_args 'Get current SA IAM policy'
   261→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_resource}:getIamPolicy" "${z_token}" \
   262→    "${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE}" "${ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON}"
   263→
   264→  local z_code
   265→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE}") || z_code=""
   266→  if test "${z_code}" != "200"; then
   267→    buc_log_args 'No IAM policy exists yet, initializing'
   268→    rbgu_write_vanilla_json "${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE}"
   269→  fi
   270→
   271→  buc_log_args 'Update SA IAM policy with new role binding'
   272→  local z_updated_policy_json=""
   273→  z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE}" \
   274→    "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_member_email}" "") \
   275→    || buc_die "Failed to update SA IAM policy"
   276→
   277→  buc_log_args 'Set updated SA IAM policy'
   278→  local z_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_sa_set_policy_body.json"
   279→  printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}" \
   280→    || buc_die "Failed to build SA setIamPolicy body"
   281→
   282→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_resource}:setIamPolicy" "${z_token}" \
   283→                                           "${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET}" "${z_set_body}"
   284→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Set SA IAM policy" "${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET}"
   285→
   286→  buc_log_args 'Successfully granted SA role' "${z_role}"
   287→}
   288→
   289→rbgi_add_bucket_iam_role() {
   290→  zrbgi_sentinel
   291→
   292→  local z_token="${1:-}"
   293→  local z_bucket_name="${2:-}"
   294→  local z_account_email="${3:-}"
   295→  local z_role="${4:-}"
   296→
   297→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token required"
   298→
   299→  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
   300→  buc_log_args "Adding bucket IAM role ${z_role} to ${z_account_email}"
   301→
   302→  local z_code
   303→
   304→  buc_log_args 'Get current bucket IAM policy'
   305→  local z_iam_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/iam"
   306→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_iam_url}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM}"
   307→  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture                  "${ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM}") || z_code=""
   308→  if test "${z_code}" != "200"; then
   309→    buc_log_args 'Initialize empty IAM policy for bucket'
   310→    rbgu_write_vanilla_json "${ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM}"
   311→  fi
   312→
   313→  buc_log_args 'Update bucket IAM policy'
   314→  local z_etag
   315→  z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM}" '.etag') || z_etag=""
   316→  local z_updated_policy_json=""
   317→  z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM}" \
   318→    "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "${z_etag}") \
   319→    || buc_die "Failed to update bucket IAM policy"
   320→
   321→  buc_log_args 'Set updated bucket IAM policy'
   322→  local z_bucket_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_bucket_set_policy_body.json"
   323→  printf '%s\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_bucket_set_body}" \
   324→    || buc_die "Failed to write bucket policy body"
   325→
   326→  local z_elapsed=0
   327→  local z_set_infix=""
   328→  while :; do
   329→    z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM_SET}-${z_elapsed}s"
   330→    rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_iam_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_bucket_set_body}"
   331→
   332→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code"
   333→    case "${z_code}" in
   334→      200) break ;;
   335→      400)
   336→        local z_err_msg
   337→        z_err_msg=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_set_infix}") || z_err_msg=""
   338→        case "${z_err_msg}" in
   339→          *"does not exist"*) buc_log_args "SA not yet visible to GCS (HTTP 400), waiting ${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s..." ;;
   340→          *) buc_die "Set bucket IAM policy (HTTP 400): ${z_err_msg}" ;;
   341→        esac
   342→        ;;
   343→      429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_code} at ${z_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
   344→      *) rbgu_http_require_ok "Set bucket IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" ;;
   345→    esac
   346→
   347→    test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" && buc_die "Set bucket IAM policy: timeout after ${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s"
   348→    sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
   349→    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
   350→  done
   351→
   352→  buc_log_args "Successfully added bucket role ${z_role}"
   353→}
   354→
   355→# eof
   356→
   357→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBOB CLI - Recipe Bottle Orchestration Bottle command-line interface
    20→#
    21→# Commands:
    22→#   start           Start bottle service (sentry + censer + bottle)
    23→#   stop            Stop bottle service
    24→#   connect_sentry  Connect to sentry container
    25→#   connect_censer  Connect to censer container
    26→#   connect_bottle  Connect to bottle container
    27→#   observe         Observe network traffic (tcpdump)
    28→#   info            Show container names, network, and runtime
    29→#   validate        Validate configuration is complete
    30→
    31→set -euo pipefail
    32→
    33→ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    34→
    35→# Source all dependencies
    36→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    37→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
    38→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_regime.sh"
    39→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
    40→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
    41→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
    42→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
    43→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbob_bottle.sh"
    44→source "${ZRBOB_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rboo_observe.sh"
    45→
    46→######################################################################
    47→# CLI Commands
    48→
    49→rbob_validate() {
    50→  zrbob_sentinel
    51→
    52→  buc_doc_brief "Validate that RBOB configuration is complete and runnable"
    53→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    54→
    55→  buc_step "RBOB Validate: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
    56→
    57→  # All values computed at kindle - just verify they exist
    58→  test -n "${ZRBOB_RUNTIME}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_RUNTIME not set"
    59→  test -n "${ZRBOB_SENTRY}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_SENTRY not set"
    60→  test -n "${ZRBOB_CENSER}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_CENSER not set"
    61→  test -n "${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_BOTTLE not set"
    62→  test -n "${ZRBOB_NETWORK}" || buc_die "ZRBOB_NETWORK not set"
    63→  test -f "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}" || buc_die "Sentry script not found: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}"
    64→
    65→  buc_step "RBOB configuration valid"
    66→  echo "Moniker:   ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
    67→  echo "Runtime:   ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME}"
    68→  echo "Sentry:    ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
    69→  echo "Censer:    ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
    70→  echo "Bottle:    ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
    71→  echo "Network:   ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}"
    72→}
    73→
    74→rbob_info() {
    75→  zrbob_sentinel
    76→
    77→  buc_doc_brief "Show container names, network, and runtime for kindled nameplate"
    78→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    79→
    80→  buc_step "RBOB Info: ${RBRN_MONIKER}"
    81→  echo "Runtime:   ${ZRBOB_RUNTIME}"
    82→  echo "Sentry:    ${ZRBOB_SENTRY}"
    83→  echo "Censer:    ${ZRBOB_CENSER}"
    84→  echo "Bottle:    ${ZRBOB_BOTTLE}"
    85→  echo "Network:   ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}"
    86→  echo "Sentry IP: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}"
    87→  echo "Bottle IP: ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}"
    88→}
    89→
    90→rbob_observe() {
    91→  zrbob_sentinel
    92→
    93→  buc_doc_brief "Observe network traffic on bottle service containers"
    94→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
    95→
    96→  # Kindle observe module and delegate
    97→  zrboo_kindle
    98→  rboo_observe
    99→}
   100→
   101→######################################################################
   102→# Furnish and Main
   103→
   104→zrbob_furnish() {
   105→  buc_doc_env "RBOB_MONIKER        " "Nameplate moniker (e.g., nsproto)"
   106→
   107→  local z_moniker="${RBOB_MONIKER:-}"
   108→  test -n "${z_moniker}" || buc_die "RBOB_MONIKER environment variable required"
   109→
   110→  zrbcc_kindle
   111→
   112→  # Load nameplate
   113→  rbrn_load_moniker "${z_moniker}"
   114→
   115→  # Load RBRR - config loading belongs in furnish per BCG pattern
   116→  rbrr_load
   117→
   118→  # Kindle depot constants (provides RBGD_GAR_LOCATION, RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID for image URLs)
   119→  zrbgc_kindle
   120→  zrbgd_kindle
   121→
   122→  # Kindle RBOB (validates RBRN and RBRR are ready)
   123→  zrbob_kindle
   124→}
   125→
   126→buc_execute rbob_ "Recipe Bottle Orchestration" zrbob_furnish "$@"
   127→
   128→# eof
   129→

    26→source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    27→source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
    28→source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrn_regime.sh"
    29→source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
    30→source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcr_render.sh"
    31→
    32→######################################################################
    33→# CLI Functions
    34→
    35→zrbrn_cli_kindle() {
    36→  test -z "${ZRBRN_CLI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "RBRN CLI already kindled"
    37→  ZRBRN_CLI_KINDLED=1
    38→}
    39→
    40→# Command: validate - source file and validate (dies on first error)
    41→rbrn_validate() {
    42→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    43→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrn_validate: file argument required"
    44→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrn_validate: file not found: ${z_file}"
    45→
    46→  buc_step "Validating RBRN nameplate file: ${z_file}"
    47→
    48→  # Use rbrn_load_file for standardized loading
    49→  rbrn_load_file "${z_file}"
    50→
    51→  buc_step "RBRN nameplate valid"
    52→}
    53→
    54→# Command: render - diagnostic display then validate
    55→rbrn_render() {
    56→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    57→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrn_render: file argument required"
    58→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrn_render: file not found: ${z_file}"
    59→
    60→  # Source and kindle (no dying — show all fields before validation)
    61→  source "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrn_render: failed to source ${z_file}"
    62→  zrbrn_kindle
    63→  zrbcr_kindle
    64→
    65→  # Display header
    66→  echo ""
    67→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}RBRN - Recipe Bottle Regime Nameplate${ZBUC_RESET}"
    68→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}File: ${z_file}${ZBUC_RESET}"
    69→  echo ""
    70→
    71→  # Core Service Identity
    72→  rbcr_section_begin "Core Service Identity"
    73→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_MONIKER              xname   req  "Unique identifier for Bottle Service"
    74→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_DESCRIPTION          string  opt  "Human-readable description"
    75→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_RUNTIME              enum    req  "Container runtime: docker or podman"
    76→  rbcr_section_end
    77→
    78→  # Container Image Configuration
    79→  rbcr_section_begin "Container Image Configuration"
    80→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL        fqin    req  "Vessel identifier for Sentry Image"
    81→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL        fqin    req  "Vessel identifier for Bottle Image"
    82→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION  fqin    req  "Consecration tag for Sentry Image"
    83→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION  fqin    req  "Consecration tag for Bottle Image"
    84→  rbcr_section_end
    85→
    86→  # Entry Service Configuration (gated by ENTRY_MODE)
    87→  rbcr_section_begin "Entry Service Configuration" RBRN_ENTRY_MODE enabled
    88→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENTRY_MODE              enum  req   "Entry functionality: disabled or enabled"
    89→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION  port  cond  "External port on Transit Network"
    90→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE      port  cond  "Enclave port between Sentry and Bottle"
    91→  rbcr_section_end
    92→
    93→  # Enclave Network Configuration
    94→  rbcr_section_begin "Enclave Network Configuration"
    95→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP      ipv4     req  "Base IPv4 for enclave network"
    96→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK      decimal  req  "Network mask width (8-30)"
    97→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP    ipv4     req  "IP address for Sentry Container"
    98→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP    ipv4     req  "IP address for Bottle Container"
    99→  rbcr_section_end
   100→
   101→  # Uplink Core
   102→  rbcr_section_begin "Uplink Core"
   103→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN      port  req  "Minimum port for outbound connections"
   104→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE      enum  req  "DNS mode: disabled, global, or allowlist"
   105→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE   enum  req  "IP access mode: disabled, global, or allowlist"
   106→  rbcr_section_end
   107→
   108→  # Uplink DNS Allowlist (gated by DNS_MODE)
   109→  rbcr_section_begin "Uplink DNS Allowlist" RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE allowlist
   110→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS  domain_list  cond  "Allowed DNS domains"
   111→  rbcr_section_end
   112→
   113→  # Uplink Access Allowlist (gated by ACCESS_MODE)
   114→  rbcr_section_begin "Uplink Access Allowlist" RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE allowlist
   115→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS  cidr_list  cond  "Allowed CIDR ranges"
   116→  rbcr_section_end
   117→
   118→  # Volume Mount Configuration
   119→  rbcr_section_begin "Volume Mount Configuration"
   120→  rbcr_section_item RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS  string  opt  "Volume mount arguments for Bottle"
   121→  rbcr_section_end
   122→
   123→  # Unexpected variables (from kindle, not gated)
   124→  if test ${#ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   125→    echo "${ZBUC_RED}Unexpected RBRN_ variables:${ZBUC_RESET}"
   126→    local z_var
   127→    for z_var in "${ZRBRN_UNEXPECTED[@]}"; do
   128→      printf "  ${ZBUC_RED}%-30s${ZBUC_RESET} = %s\n" "${z_var}" "${!z_var:-}"
   129→    done
   130→    echo ""
   131→  fi
   132→
   133→  # Validate (dies on first error, after full display)
   134→  zrbrn_validate_fields
   135→  echo "${ZBUC_GREEN}RBRN nameplate valid${ZBUC_RESET}"
   136→}
   137→
   138→######################################################################
   139→# Main dispatch
   140→
   141→zrbrn_cli_kindle
   142→zrbcc_kindle
   143→
   144→z_command="${1:-}"
   145→z_moniker="${2:-}"
   146→
   147→case "${z_command}" in
   148→  validate|render)
   149→    if test -z "${z_moniker}"; then
   150→      buc_step "Available nameplates:"
   151→      rbrn_list | while read -r z_m; do
   152→        echo "  ${z_m}"
   153→      done
   154→    else
   155→      z_file="${RBCC_KIT_DIR}/${RBCC_RBRN_PREFIX}${z_moniker}${RBCC_RBRN_EXT}"
   156→      test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "Nameplate not found: ${z_file}"
   157→      case "${z_command}" in
   158→        validate) rbrn_validate "${z_file}" ;;
   159→        render)   rbrn_render "${z_file}" ;;
   160→      esac
   161→    fi
   162→    ;;
   163→  survey|audit)
   164→    # Additional dependencies for cross-nameplate operations
   165→    source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
   166→    source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgd_DepotConstants.sh"
   167→    source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
   168→    source "${ZRBRN_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbgo_OAuth.sh"
   169→    zrbgc_kindle
   170→    rbrr_load
   171→    zrbgo_kindle
   172→    zrbgd_kindle
   173→    case "${z_command}" in
   174→      survey) rbrn_survey ;;
   175→      audit)
   176→        rbrn_audit
   177→        # GCB quota headroom check (requires Director SA token)
   178→        z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
   179→          || buc_die "Failed to get token for GCB quota check"
   180→        rbgd_check_gcb_quota "${z_token}"
   181→        buc_step "Full audit passed (nameplates + GCB quota)"
   182→        ;;
   183→    esac
   184→    ;;
   185→  *)
   186→    buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}. Usage: rbrn_cli.sh {validate|render|survey|audit} [moniker]"
   187→    ;;
   188→esac
   189→
   190→# eof
   191→

    19→# RBRR CLI - Command line interface for RBRR repo regime operations
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    24→
    25→# Source dependencies
    26→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    27→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
    28→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
    29→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
    30→source "${ZRBRR_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcr_render.sh"
    31→
    32→######################################################################
    33→# CLI Functions
    34→
    35→zrbrr_cli_kindle() {
    36→  test -z "${ZRBRR_CLI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "RBRR CLI already kindled"
    37→
    38→  # GCB runs on linux/amd64 — pin digests must match this platform
    39→  ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS="linux"
    40→  ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH="amd64"
    41→
    42→  ZRBRR_CLI_KINDLED=1
    43→}
    44→
    45→# Command: validate - source file and validate (dies on first error)
    46→rbrr_validate() {
    47→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    48→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_validate: file argument required"
    49→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_validate: file not found: ${z_file}"
    50→
    51→  buc_step "Validating RBRR repo regime file: ${z_file}"
    52→
    53→  # Use rbrr_load for standardized loading
    54→  rbrr_load
    55→
    56→  buc_step "RBRR repo regime valid"
    57→}
    58→
    59→# Command: render - diagnostic display then validate
    60→rbrr_render() {
    61→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    62→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: file argument required"
    63→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: file not found: ${z_file}"
    64→
    65→  # Source and kindle (no dying — show all fields before validation)
    66→  source "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrr_render: failed to source ${z_file}"
    67→  zrbrr_kindle
    68→  zrbcr_kindle
    69→
    70→  # Display header
    71→  echo ""
    72→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}RBRR - Recipe Bottle Regime Repo${ZBUC_RESET}"
    73→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}File: ${z_file}${ZBUC_RESET}"
    74→  echo ""
    75→
    76→  # Vessel and Local Configuration
    77→  rbcr_section_begin "Vessel and Local Configuration"
    78→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_VESSEL_DIR              string  req  "Vessel definitions directory"
    79→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DNS_SERVER              ipv4    req  "DNS server for containers"
    80→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_IGNITE_MACHINE_NAME     xname   req  "Podman machine for ignite operations"
    81→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DEPLOY_MACHINE_NAME     xname   req  "Podman machine for deploy operations"
    82→  rbcr_section_end
    83→
    84→  # Build Tool Configuration
    85→  rbcr_section_begin "Build Tool Configuration"
    86→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CRANE_TAR_GZ            string  req  "Crane binary archive path"
    87→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_MANIFEST_PLATFORMS      string  req  "Target platforms for manifests"
    88→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_PODMAN_VERSION   string  req  "Podman version (semantic version)"
    89→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_VMIMAGE_ORIGIN   fqin    req  "VM image origin reference"
    90→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_CHOSEN_IDENTITY         string  req  "Identity for operations"
    91→  rbcr_section_end
    92→
    93→  # GCP Infrastructure
    94→  rbcr_section_begin "GCP Infrastructure"
    95→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID        gname   req  "GCP project ID for depot"
    96→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCP_REGION              gname   req  "GCP region"
    97→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY          gname   req  "Google Artifact Registry repository name"
    98→  rbcr_section_end
    99→
   100→  # Google Cloud Build Configuration
   101→  rbcr_section_begin "Google Cloud Build Configuration"
   102→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE        string  req  "Machine type for Cloud Build"
   103→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT             string  req  "Build timeout (e.g., 1200s)"
   104→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS decimal req "Min concurrent builds required"
   105→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "gcrane image reference (digest-pinned)"
   106→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF      odref   req  "oras image reference (digest-pinned)"
   107→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "gcloud image reference (digest-pinned)"
   108→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "docker image reference (digest-pinned)"
   109→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "skopeo image reference (digest-pinned)"
   110→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "alpine image reference (digest-pinned)"
   111→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF      odref   req  "syft image reference (digest-pinned)"
   112→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF    odref   req  "binfmt image reference (digest-pinned)"
   113→  rbcr_section_end
   114→
   115→  # Service Account Configuration
   116→  rbcr_section_begin "Service Account Configuration"
   117→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE      string  req  "Governor service account key file"
   118→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE     string  req  "Retriever service account key file"
   119→  rbcr_section_item RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE      string  req  "Director service account key file"
   120→  rbcr_section_end
   121→
   122→  # Unexpected variables (from kindle, not gated)
   123→  if test ${#ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   124→    echo "${ZBUC_RED}Unexpected RBRR_ variables:${ZBUC_RESET}"
   125→    local z_var
   126→    for z_var in "${ZRBRR_UNEXPECTED[@]}"; do
   127→      printf "  ${ZBUC_RED}%-30s${ZBUC_RESET} = %s\n" "${z_var}" "${!z_var:-}"
   128→    done
   129→    echo ""
   130→  fi
   131→
   132→  # Validate (dies on first error, after full display)
   133→  zrbrr_validate_fields
   134→  echo "${ZBUC_GREEN}RBRR repo regime valid${ZBUC_RESET}"
   135→}
   136→
   137→# Command: refresh_gcb_pins - resolve image tags to digests and update RBRR file
   138→# Every step must succeed or the function dies — no partial updates.
   139→# Requires: docker, jq, curl, RBCC_RBRR_FILE set, BURD_NOW_STAMP set, BURD_TEMP_DIR set
   140→rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins() {
   141→  local z_rbrr_file="${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   142→  test -f "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "RBRR config not found: ${z_rbrr_file}"
   143→  test -n "${BURD_NOW_STAMP:-}" || buc_die "BURD_NOW_STAMP not set - must be called from BURD"
   144→  test -d "${BURD_TEMP_DIR:-}" || buc_die "BURD_TEMP_DIR not set or not a directory"
   145→
   146→  buc_countdown 5 "NOTE: Docker anonymous login is heavily rate limited.  Try again in 6 hours if you see that fail.  Continuing in:"
   147→
   148→  local z_vintage="${BURD_NOW_STAMP}"
   149→  local z_oras_token_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_token.json"
   150→  local z_oras_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_tags.json"
   151→  local z_oras_token_value_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_token_value.txt"
   152→  local z_oras_tag_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_oras_tag.txt"
   153→  local z_refresh_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_refresh_"
   154→  local z_refresh_sed_prefix="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbrr_refresh_sed_"
   155→
   156→  # Discover latest oras stable version from GHCR API.
   157→  # oras doesn't publish a :latest tag, so we must find the newest semver release.
   158→  # GHCR requires a bearer token even for public images.
   159→  buc_step "Discovering latest oras version from GHCR (no :latest tag published)"
   160→
   161→  buc_log_args "Obtaining GHCR bearer token (anonymous, scoped to oras repo)"
   162→  curl -sS \
   163→    "https://ghcr.io/token?scope=repository:oras-project/oras:pull&service=ghcr.io" \
   164→    -o "${z_oras_token_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   165→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch GHCR bearer token"
   166→
   167→  jq -r '.token // empty' "${z_oras_token_file}" > "${z_oras_token_value_file}" \
   168→    || buc_die "Failed to extract token from GHCR response"
   169→  local z_oras_token
   170→  z_oras_token=$(<"${z_oras_token_value_file}")
   171→  test -n "${z_oras_token}" || buc_die "GHCR returned empty bearer token"
   172→
   173→  buc_log_args "Fetching tag list using bearer token"
   174→  curl -sS \
   175→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_oras_token}" \
   176→    "https://ghcr.io/v2/oras-project/oras/tags/list?n=1000" \
   177→    -o "${z_oras_tags_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   178→    || buc_die "Failed to fetch oras tags from GHCR"
   179→
   180→  buc_log_args "Extracting newest stable semver tag"
   181→  # Filters to exact vN.N.N (no pre-release suffixes), sorts numerically, takes last
   182→  jq -r '
   183→    [.tags[] | select(test("^v[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+$"))]
   184→    | map(ltrimstr("v") | split(".") | map(tonumber))
   185→    | sort_by(.[0], .[1], .[2])
   186→    | last
   187→    | "v\(.[0]).\(.[1]).\(.[2])"
   188→  ' "${z_oras_tags_file}" > "${z_oras_tag_file}" \
   189→    || buc_die "Failed to extract semver tag from oras tags response"
   190→  local z_oras_tag
   191→  z_oras_tag=$(<"${z_oras_tag_file}")
   192→  test -n "${z_oras_tag}" -a "${z_oras_tag}" != "null" \
   193→    || buc_die "No stable oras semver tag found in GHCR tag list"
   194→  buc_info "oras discovered tag: ${z_oras_tag}"
   195→
   196→  # Image specifications: VARNAME|BASE_IMAGE|TAG
   197→  # Most images use :latest which always points to newest version.
   198→  # oras uses discovered semver tag above (no :latest published).
   199→  local z_specs=(
   200→    "RBRR_GCB_GCRANE_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/go-containerregistry/gcrane|latest"
   201→    "RBRR_GCB_ORAS_IMAGE_REF|ghcr.io/oras-project/oras|${z_oras_tag}"
   202→    "RBRR_GCB_GCLOUD_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/cloud-builders/gcloud|latest"
   203→    "RBRR_GCB_DOCKER_IMAGE_REF|gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker|latest"
   204→    "RBRR_GCB_SKOPEO_IMAGE_REF|quay.io/skopeo/stable|latest"
   205→    "RBRR_GCB_ALPINE_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/library/alpine|latest"
   206→    "RBRR_GCB_SYFT_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/anchore/syft|latest"
   207→    "RBRR_GCB_BINFMT_IMAGE_REF|docker.io/tonistiigi/binfmt|latest"
   208→  )
   209→
   210→  buc_step "Refreshing GCB tool image pins (vintage: ~${z_vintage})"
   211→
   212→  local z_updated=0
   213→  local z_unchanged=0
   214→
   215→  local z_spec=""
   216→  local z_varname=""
   217→  local z_image=""
   218→  local z_tag=""
   219→  local z_manifest_file=""
   220→  local z_digest_file=""
   221→  local z_oldref_file=""
   222→  local z_digest=""
   223→  local z_full_ref=""
   224→  local z_old_ref=""
   225→  local z_sed_value_file=""
   226→  local z_sed_vintage_file=""
   227→  for z_spec in "${z_specs[@]}"; do
   228→    IFS='|' read -r z_varname z_image z_tag <<< "${z_spec}"
   229→
   230→    z_manifest_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_manifest.json"
   231→    z_digest_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_digest.txt"
   232→    z_oldref_file="${z_refresh_prefix}${z_varname}_oldref.txt"
   233→    z_sed_value_file="${z_refresh_sed_prefix}${z_varname}_value.sh"
   234→    z_sed_vintage_file="${z_refresh_sed_prefix}${z_varname}_vintage.sh"
   235→
   236→    buc_step "Inspecting ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   237→
   238→    docker manifest inspect --verbose "${z_image}:${z_tag}" > "${z_manifest_file}" 2>/dev/null \
   239→      || buc_die "Failed to fetch manifest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   240→
   241→    buc_log_args "Extracting ${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS}/${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH} digest from manifest"
   242→    jq -r --arg os "${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_OS}" --arg arch "${ZRBRR_CLI_PIN_ARCH}" '
   243→      if type == "array" then
   244→        [.[] | select(.Descriptor.platform.architecture == $arch
   245→                  and .Descriptor.platform.os == $os)][0].Descriptor.digest
   246→      else
   247→        .Descriptor.digest
   248→      end' \
   249→      "${z_manifest_file}" > "${z_digest_file}" \
   250→      || buc_die "Failed to extract digest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   251→    z_digest=$(<"${z_digest_file}")
   252→    test -n "${z_digest}" || buc_die "Empty digest for ${z_image}:${z_tag}"
   253→    z_full_ref="${z_image}@${z_digest}"
   254→
   255→    grep "^${z_varname}=" "${z_rbrr_file}" | cut -d'"' -f2 > "${z_oldref_file}" \
   256→      || buc_die "No existing value for ${z_varname} in rbrr file"
   257→    z_old_ref=$(<"${z_oldref_file}")
   258→
   259→    if test "${z_old_ref}" = "${z_full_ref}"; then
   260→      buc_info "${z_varname}: unchanged"
   261→      z_unchanged=$((z_unchanged + 1))
   262→    else
   263→      buc_info "${z_varname}: ${z_old_ref} -> ${z_full_ref}"
   264→
   265→      sed "s|^${z_varname}=.*|${z_varname}=\"${z_full_ref}\"|" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_sed_value_file}" \
   266→        || buc_die "Failed to sed value for ${z_varname}"
   267→      mv "${z_sed_value_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update ${z_varname} in rbrr file"
   268→
   269→      buc_log_args "Updating vintage comment for ${z_varname}"
   270→      sed "/${z_varname}=/{
   271→        x
   272→        s|(~[^)]*)|(~${z_vintage})|
   273→        x
   274→      }" "${z_rbrr_file}" > "${z_sed_vintage_file}" \
   275→        || buc_die "Failed to update vintage comment for ${z_varname}"
   276→      test -s "${z_sed_vintage_file}" || buc_die "Vintage sed produced empty output for ${z_varname}"
   277→      mv "${z_sed_vintage_file}" "${z_rbrr_file}" || buc_die "Failed to update vintage for ${z_varname}"
   278→
   279→      z_updated=$((z_updated + 1))
   280→    fi
   281→  done
   282→
   283→  buc_step "Refresh complete: ${z_updated} updated, ${z_unchanged} unchanged"
   284→}
   285→
   286→######################################################################
   287→# Main dispatch
   288→
   289→zrbrr_cli_kindle
   290→zrbcc_kindle
   291→
   292→z_command="${1:-}"
   293→
   294→case "${z_command}" in
   295→  validate|render)
   296→    z_file="${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   297→    test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "RBRR regime file not found: ${z_file}"
   298→    case "${z_command}" in
   299→      validate) rbrr_validate "${z_file}" ;;
   300→      render)   rbrr_render "${z_file}" ;;
   301→    esac
   302→    ;;
   303→  refresh_gcb_pins)
   304→    rbrr_refresh_gcb_pins
   305→    ;;
   306→  *)
   307→    buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}. Usage: rbrr_cli.sh {validate|render|refresh_gcb_pins}"
   308→    ;;
   309→esac
   310→
   311→# eof
   312→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBRV CLI - Command line interface for RBRV vessel operations
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→ZRBRV_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    24→
    25→# Source dependencies
    26→source "${ZRBRV_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buc_command.sh"
    27→source "${ZRBRV_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/../buk/buv_validation.sh"
    28→source "${ZRBRV_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrv_regime.sh"
    29→source "${ZRBRV_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
    30→source "${ZRBRV_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr_regime.sh"
    31→source "${ZRBRV_CLI_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbcr_render.sh"
    32→
    33→######################################################################
    34→# CLI Functions
    35→
    36→zrbrv_cli_kindle() {
    37→  test -z "${ZRBRV_CLI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "RBRV CLI already kindled"
    38→  ZRBRV_CLI_KINDLED=1
    39→}
    40→
    41→# Command: validate - source file and validate (dies on first error)
    42→rbrv_validate() {
    43→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    44→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrv_validate: file argument required"
    45→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrv_validate: file not found: ${z_file}"
    46→
    47→  buc_step "Validating RBRV vessel file: ${z_file}"
    48→
    49→  # Source the assignment file
    50→  source "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrv_validate: failed to source ${z_file}"
    51→
    52→  # Prepare state (no dying)
    53→  zrbrv_kindle
    54→
    55→  # Strict validation (dies on error)
    56→  zrbrv_validate_fields
    57→
    58→  buc_step "RBRV vessel valid"
    59→}
    60→
    61→# Command: render - diagnostic display then validate
    62→rbrv_render() {
    63→  local z_file="${1:-}"
    64→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrv_render: file argument required"
    65→  test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrv_render: file not found: ${z_file}"
    66→
    67→  # Source and kindle (no dying — show all fields before validation)
    68→  source "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrv_render: failed to source ${z_file}"
    69→  zrbrv_kindle
    70→  zrbcr_kindle
    71→
    72→  # Display header
    73→  echo ""
    74→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}RBRV - Recipe Bottle Regime Vessel${ZBUC_RESET}"
    75→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}File: ${z_file}${ZBUC_RESET}"
    76→  echo ""
    77→
    78→  # Core Vessel Identity
    79→  rbcr_section_begin "Core Vessel Identity"
    80→  rbcr_section_item RBRV_SIGIL        xname   req  "Unique identifier (must match directory name)"
    81→  rbcr_section_item RBRV_DESCRIPTION  string  opt  "Human-readable description"
    82→  rbcr_section_item RBRV_VESSEL_MODE  enum    req  "Operation mode: bind or conjure"
    83→  rbcr_section_end
    84→
    85→  # Binding Configuration (conditional: RBRV_VESSEL_MODE=bind)
    86→  rbcr_section_begin "Binding Configuration" RBRV_VESSEL_MODE bind
    87→  rbcr_section_item RBRV_BIND_IMAGE  fqin  req  "Source image to copy from registry"
    88→  rbcr_section_end
    89→
    90→  # Conjuring Configuration (conditional: RBRV_VESSEL_MODE=conjure)
    91→  rbcr_section_begin "Conjuring Configuration" RBRV_VESSEL_MODE conjure
    92→  rbcr_section_item RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE     string  req  "Dockerfile path relative to repo root"
    93→  rbcr_section_item RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT     string  req  "Build context relative to repo root"
    94→  rbcr_section_item RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS      string  req  "Space-separated target platforms"
    95→  rbcr_section_item RBRV_CONJURE_BINFMT_POLICY  enum    req  "Cross-platform policy: allow or forbid"
    96→  rbcr_section_end
    97→
    98→  # Unexpected variables (from kindle, not gated)
    99→  if test ${#ZRBRV_UNEXPECTED[@]} -gt 0; then
   100→    echo "${ZBUC_RED}Unexpected RBRV_ variables:${ZBUC_RESET}"
   101→    local z_var
   102→    for z_var in "${ZRBRV_UNEXPECTED[@]}"; do
   103→      printf "  ${ZBUC_RED}%-30s${ZBUC_RESET} = %s\n" "${z_var}" "${!z_var:-}"
   104→    done
   105→    echo ""
   106→  fi
   107→
   108→  # Validate (dies on first error, after full display)
   109→  zrbrv_validate_fields
   110→  echo "${ZBUC_GREEN}RBRV vessel valid${ZBUC_RESET}"
   111→}
   112→
   113→######################################################################
   114→# Main dispatch
   115→
   116→zrbrv_cli_kindle
   117→zrbcc_kindle
   118→
   119→z_command="${1:-}"
   120→z_sigil="${2:-}"
   121→
   122→case "${z_command}" in
   123→  validate|render)
   124→    if test -z "${z_sigil}"; then
   125→      # Load RBRR to get RBRR_VESSEL_DIR
   126→      test -f "${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}" || buc_die "RBRR regime file not found: ${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   127→      rbrr_load
   128→      buc_step "Available vessels:"
   129→      rbrv_list | while read -r z_s; do
   130→        echo "  ${z_s}"
   131→      done
   132→    else
   133→      # Load RBRR to get RBRR_VESSEL_DIR for path resolution
   134→      test -f "${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}" || buc_die "RBRR regime file not found: ${RBCC_RBRR_FILE}"
   135→      rbrr_load
   136→      z_file="${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}/rbrv.env"
   137→      test -f "${z_file}" || buc_die "Vessel not found: ${z_file}"
   138→      case "${z_command}" in
   139→        validate) rbrv_validate "${z_file}" ;;
   140→        render)   rbrv_render "${z_file}" ;;
   141→      esac
   142→    fi
   143→    ;;
   144→  *)
   145→    buc_die "Unknown command: ${z_command}. Usage: rbrv_cli.sh {validate|render} [sigil]"
   146→    ;;
   147→esac
   148→
   149→# eof
   150→

    51→

    55→
    56→  buc_step "RBRP payor valid"
    57→}
    58→
    59→# Command: render - diagnostic display then validate
    60→rbrp_render() {

    62→  test -n "${z_file}" || buc_die "rbrp_render: file argument required"

    64→

    67→  zrbgc_kindle

    70→
    71→  # Display header
    72→  echo ""
    73→  echo "${ZBUC_WHITE}RBRP - Recipe Bottle Regime Payor${ZBUC_RESET}"

    75→  echo ""
    76→
    77→  # Payor Project Identity
    78→  rbcr_section_begin "Payor Project Identity"
    79→  rbcr_section_item RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID  string  req  "GCP project hosting OAuth client"
    80→  rbcr_section_end
    81→
    82→  # Billing Configuration
    83→  rbcr_section_begin "Billing Configuration"
    84→  rbcr_section_item RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID  string  opt  "Billing account for depot projects"
    85→  rbcr_section_end
    86→
    87→  # OAuth Configuration
    88→  rbcr_section_begin "OAuth Configuration"
    89→  rbcr_section_item RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID  string  opt  "OAuth 2.0 client identifier"
    90→  rbcr_section_end
    91→
    92→  # Validate after full render
    93→  echo "${ZBUC_GREEN}RBRP payor valid${ZBUC_RESET}"

    95→
    96→######################################################################
    97→# Main dispatch
    98→
    99→zrbrp_cli_kindle
   100→zrbcc_kindle
   101→
   102→z_command="${1:-}"
   103→
   104→case "${z_command}" in

    25→ZRBF_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbf_*)
    29→
    30→zrbf_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBF_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbf already kindled"
    32→
    33→  # Validate environment
    34→  buv_dir_exists "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
    35→  test -n "${BURD_NOW_STAMP:-}" || buc_die "BURD_NOW_STAMP is unset or empty"
    36→
    37→  buc_log_args 'Check required GCB/GAR environment variables'
    38→  zrbgc_sentinel
    39→
    40→  buc_log_args 'Verify service account files'
    41→  test -n "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE:-}" || buc_die "RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE not set"
    42→  test -f "${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"   || buc_die "GCB service env file not found: ${RBRR_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}"
    43→
    44→  buc_log_args 'Module Variables (ZRBF_*)'
    45→  ZRBF_GCB_API_BASE="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com/v1"
    46→  ZRBF_GAR_API_BASE="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1"
    47→  ZRBF_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE="https://console.cloud.google.com/cloud-build/builds"
    48→
    49→  ZRBF_GCB_API_BASE_UPLOAD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com/upload/v1"
    50→
    51→  # GCS endpoints (build-source uploads)
    52→  ZRBF_GCS_API_BASE="https://storage.googleapis.com/storage/v1"
    53→  ZRBF_GCS_UPLOAD_BASE="https://storage.googleapis.com/upload/storage/v1"
    54→
    55→  # Temp files for object naming and requests
    56→  ZRBF_TARBALL_NAME_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_tarball_name.txt"
    57→  ZRBF_GCS_OBJECT_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_gcs_object.txt"
    58→  ZRBF_BUILD_REQUEST_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_build_request.json"
    59→  ZRBF_GCS_UPLOAD_RESP="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_gcs_upload_resp.json"
    60→  ZRBF_GCS_UPLOAD_HTTP="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_gcs_upload_http.txt"
    61→
    62→  ZRBF_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL="${ZRBF_GCB_API_BASE}/projects/${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/builds"
    63→  ZRBF_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_UPLOAD_URL="${ZRBF_GCB_API_BASE_UPLOAD}/projects/${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/builds"
    64→  ZRBF_GAR_PACKAGE_BASE="projects/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}/repositories/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    65→
    66→  buc_log_args 'Registry API endpoints for delete'
    67→  ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
    68→  ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    69→  ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE="https://${ZRBF_REGISTRY_HOST}/v2/${ZRBF_REGISTRY_PATH}"
    70→
    71→  buc_log_args 'Media types for delete operation'
    72→  ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES="application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json,application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json,application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json,application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json"
    73→
    74→  buc_log_args 'RBGJ files in same Tools directory as this implementation'
    75→  # Acronyms: rbgjb = Recipe Bottle Google Json Build (step scripts in rbgjb/ dir)
    76→  #           rbgjm = Recipe Bottle Google Json Mirror
    77→  local z_self_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    78→  ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR="${z_self_dir}/rbgjb"
    79→  ZRBF_RBGJM_MIRROR_FILE="${z_self_dir}/rbgjm_mirror.json"
    80→  test -d "${ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}"   || buc_die "RBGJB steps directory not found: ${ZRBF_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}"

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# Recipe Bottle GCP Depot Constants - Project-dependent Implementation
    20→
    21→set -euo pipefail
    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→test -z "${ZRBGD_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgd multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    25→ZRBGD_SOURCED=1
    26→
    27→######################################################################
    28→# Internal Functions (zrbgd_*)
    29→
    30→zrbgd_kindle() {
    31→  test -z "${ZRBGD_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgd already kindled"
    32→
    33→  buc_log_args 'Validate RBRR variables using validator'
    34→  ZRBGD_SCRIPT_DIR="$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")"
    35→  source "${ZRBGD_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbrr.validator.sh" || buc_die "Failed to validate RBRR variables"
    36→
    37→  # Depot-specific Constants (require RBRR variables)
    38→  # Note: RBGD_GCS_BUCKET defined below after depot name extraction
    39→
    40→  # Service-specific Aliases
    41→  RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    42→  RBGD_GAR_LOCATION="${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"
    43→  RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    44→  RBGD_GCB_REGION="${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"
    45→
    46→  # Project-dependent API Paths
    47→  RBGD_PROJECT_RESOURCE="${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    48→
    49→  # Common API Base Paths (hoisted for reuse)
    50→  RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES}"
    51→  RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    52→  RBGD_API_BASE_IAM_PROJECT="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    53→
    54→  # IAM Service Accounts
    55→  RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="${RBGD_API_BASE_IAM_PROJECT}${RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}"
    56→  RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}.${RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN}"
    57→
    58→  # Extract depot name and timestamp from project ID pattern rbwg-d-{depot_name}-{timestamp}
    59→  # Using bash builtins per BCG: remove prefix, then remove suffix (hyphen + timestamp)
    60→  local z_without_prefix="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID#${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-}"
    61→  local z_len=${#z_without_prefix}
    62→  local z_suffix_len=$((1 + RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN))
    63→  RBGD_DEPOT_NAME="${z_without_prefix:0:$((z_len - z_suffix_len))}"
    64→  local z_timestamp="${z_without_prefix: -${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
    65→
    66→  # Bucket name follows same pattern as project but with 'b' type instead of 'd'
    67→  RBGD_GCS_BUCKET="${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-${RBGD_DEPOT_NAME}-${z_timestamp}"
    68→  RBGD_MASON_EMAIL="${RBGC_MASON_PREFIX}-${RBGD_DEPOT_NAME}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"
    69→
    70→  # Cloud Resource Manager (CRM) APIs
    71→  RBGD_API_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}${RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
    72→  RBGD_API_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}${RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
    73→  RBGD_API_CRM_GET_PROJECT="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}"
    74→  RBGD_API_CRM_DELETE_PROJECT="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}"
    75→  RBGD_API_CRM_UNDELETE_PROJECT="${RBGD_API_BASE_CRM_PROJECT}:undelete"
    76→
    77→  # Service Usage - API Enablement
    78→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_IAM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_IAM}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    79→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_CRM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_CRM}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    80→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_GAR="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    81→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_BUILD="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/cloudbuild.googleapis.com${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    82→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_ANALYSIS="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/containeranalysis.googleapis.com${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    83→  RBGD_API_SU_ENABLE_STORAGE="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/storage.googleapis.com${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX}"
    84→
    85→  # Service Usage - API Verification
    86→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_IAM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_IAM}"
    87→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_CRM="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_CRM}"
    88→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_GAR="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/${RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}"
    89→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_BUILD="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
    90→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_ANALYSIS="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/containeranalysis.googleapis.com"
    91→  RBGD_API_SU_VERIFY_STORAGE="${RBGD_API_BASE_SERVICEUSAGE}/storage.googleapis.com"
    92→
    93→  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs
    94→  RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_CREATE="${RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS}?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
    95→  RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_OPS="${RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS}/${RBGD_GCS_BUCKET}"
    96→  RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_OBJECTS="${RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_OPS}/o"
    97→  RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_IAM="${RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_OPS}/iam"
    98→
    99→  # Service Usage - Quota Metrics (v1beta1 — quota API not yet in v1)
   100→  RBGD_API_QUOTA_GCB="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1}${RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS}/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/services/cloudbuild.googleapis.com/consumerQuotaMetrics"
   101→
   102→  ZRBGD_KINDLED=1
   103→}
   104→
   105→zrbgd_sentinel() {
   106→  test "${ZRBGD_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgd not kindled - call zrbgd_kindle first"
   107→}
   108→
   109→######################################################################
   110→# External Functions (rbgd_*)
   111→
   112→# Validate that the depot project's GCB CPU quota can support the
   113→# configured machine type at the operator's declared minimum concurrency.
   114→# Hard fails if quota is insufficient or unqueryable.
   115→#
   116→# Parameters:
   117→#   $1 - Bearer token with serviceusage.quotas read access on depot project
   118→rbgd_check_gcb_quota() {
   119→  zrbgd_sentinel
   120→
   121→  local z_token="$1"
   122→  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "rbgd_check_gcb_quota: bearer token required"
   123→
   124→  buc_log_args "Look up vCPUs for machine type: ${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}"
   125→  local z_vcpus=""
   126→  z_vcpus=$(rbgc_gcb_machine_vcpus_capture "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}") \
   127→    || buc_die "Failed to resolve vCPUs for machine type: ${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}"
   128→
   129→  buc_log_args "Query GCB quota from Service Usage API"
   130→  local z_resp="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgd_quota_resp.json"
   131→  local z_code="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgd_quota_code.txt"
   132→
   133→  curl -sS \
   134→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
   135→    -o "${z_resp}" \
   136→    -w "%{http_code}" \
   137→    "${RBGD_API_QUOTA_GCB}" > "${z_code}" 2>&1
   138→
   139→  local z_http_code=""
   140→  z_http_code=$(<"${z_code}")
   141→  test "${z_http_code}" = "200" \
   142→    || buc_die "GCB quota query failed: HTTP ${z_http_code} (check SA permissions for serviceusage.quotas on ${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID})"
   143→
   144→  buc_log_args "Extract concurrent_public_pool_build_cpus effective limit"
   145→  local z_cpu_quota=""
   146→  z_cpu_quota=$(jq -r '
   147→    .metrics[]
   148→    | select(.metric == "cloudbuild.googleapis.com/concurrent_public_pool_build_cpus")
   149→    | .consumerQuotaLimits[0]
   150→    | .quotaBuckets[]
   151→    | select(has("dimensions") | not)
   152→    | .effectiveLimit
   153→  ' "${z_resp}") || buc_die "Failed to parse quota response"
   154→
   155→  test -n "${z_cpu_quota}" \
   156→    || buc_die "Could not find concurrent_public_pool_build_cpus in quota response"
   157→
   158→  local z_max_concurrent=$(( z_cpu_quota / z_vcpus ))
   159→
   160→  buc_step "GCB quota: ${z_cpu_quota} CPUs / ${z_vcpus} vCPU (${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}) = ${z_max_concurrent} max concurrent (need ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS})"
   161→
   162→  test "${z_max_concurrent}" -ge "${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS}" \
   163→    || buc_die "GCB quota insufficient: ${z_max_concurrent} concurrent builds available, ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS} required"
   164→}
   165→
   166→# eof

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# RBOB - Recipe Bottle Orchestration Bottle
    20→# Container lifecycle management for bottle services (sentry + censer + bottle)
    21→#
    22→# Requires: buc_command.sh sourced
    23→# Requires: rbrn_regime.sh sourced
    24→# Requires: rbrr_regime.sh sourced
    25→
    26→set -euo pipefail
    27→
    28→# Multiple inclusion detection
    29→test -z "${ZRBOB_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbob multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    30→ZRBOB_SOURCED=1
    31→
    32→# Store script directory for locating sibling files (rbss.sentry.sh)
    33→ZRBOB_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    34→
    35→# Project root directory (two levels up from Tools/rbw/)
    36→ZRBOB_PROJECT_ROOT="${ZRBOB_SCRIPT_DIR}/../.."
    37→
    38→######################################################################
    39→# Kindle and Sentinel
    40→
    41→zrbob_kindle() {
    42→  test -z "${ZRBOB_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbob already kindled"
    43→
    44→  # Verify RBRN regime is kindled (provides nameplate config)
    45→  zrbrn_sentinel
    46→
    47→  # Verify RBRR regime is kindled (provides repo config like DNS_SERVER)
    48→  zrbrr_sentinel
    49→
    50→  # Runtime command (docker or podman)
    51→  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
    52→    docker) ZRBOB_RUNTIME="docker" ;;
    53→    podman) ZRBOB_RUNTIME="podman" ;;
    54→    *) buc_die "Unknown RBRN_RUNTIME: ${RBRN_RUNTIME}" ;;
    55→  esac
    56→
    57→  # Container names
    58→  ZRBOB_SENTRY="${RBRN_MONIKER}-sentry"
    59→  ZRBOB_CENSER="${RBRN_MONIKER}-censer"
    60→  ZRBOB_BOTTLE="${RBRN_MONIKER}-bottle"
    61→
    62→  # Network name
    63→  ZRBOB_NETWORK="${RBRN_MONIKER}-enclave"
    64→
    65→  # Sentry configuration script
    66→  ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT="${ZRBOB_SCRIPT_DIR}/rbss.sentry.sh"
    67→  test -f "${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}" || buc_die "Sentry script not found: ${ZRBOB_SENTRY_SCRIPT}"
    68→
    69→  # Runtime-specific censer network args
    70→  # Docker uses --ip separately, Podman uses network:ip= syntax
    71→  case "${RBRN_RUNTIME}" in
    72→    docker) ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS="--network ${ZRBOB_NETWORK} --ip ${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" ;;
    73→    podman) ZRBOB_CENSER_NETWORK_ARGS="--network ${ZRBOB_NETWORK}:ip=${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" ;;
    74→  esac
    75→
    76→  # GAR image references (computed once, used by launch and preflight)
    77→  local z_gar_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
    78→  ZRBOB_SENTRY_IMAGE="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL}:${RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
    79→  ZRBOB_BOTTLE_IMAGE="${z_gar_base}/${RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL}:${RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"
    80→

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→# Launcher stub - delegates to RBW workbench
     3→source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/../Tools/buk/bul_launcher.sh"
     4→bul_launch "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/rbw/rbw_workbench.sh" "$@"

1→#!/bin/bash
     2→#
     3→# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
     4→#
     5→# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
     6→# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
     7→# You may obtain a copy of the License at
     8→#
     9→#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
    10→#
    11→# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
    12→# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
    13→# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
    14→# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
    15→# limitations under the License.
    16→#
    17→# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
    18→#
    19→# BUL Launcher - Shared launcher logic for BUK workbenches.
    20→# Sourced by individual launcher stubs in .buk/
    21→# Compatible with Bash 3.2 (e.g., macOS default shell)
    22→#
    23→# NOTE: This is bootstrap infrastructure, not a full BCG module.
    24→# No kindle/sentinel pattern - this runs before BCG modules are loaded.
    25→
    26→# Guard against multiple inclusion
    27→test -z "${ZBUL_LAUNCHER_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
    28→ZBUL_LAUNCHER_SOURCED=1
    29→
    30→# Establish project root from the sourcing launcher's location
    31→ZBUL_PROJECT_ROOT="${BASH_SOURCE[1]%/*}/.."
    32→cd "${ZBUL_PROJECT_ROOT}" || exit 1
    33→
    34→# Load BURC configuration
    35→export BURD_REGIME_FILE="${ZBUL_PROJECT_ROOT}/.buk/burc.env"
    36→source "${BURD_REGIME_FILE}" || exit 1
    37→
    38→# Apply BURV (Bash Utility Regime Verification) overrides if set
    39→BURC_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR="${BURV_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR:-${BURC_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR}}"
    40→BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR="${BURV_TEMP_ROOT_DIR:-${BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR}}"
    41→
    42→# Source BUK modules and kindle BURC
    43→export BURD_STATION_FILE="${ZBUL_PROJECT_ROOT}/${BURC_STATION_FILE}"
    44→source "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/buk/buc_command.sh"
    45→source "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/buk/burc_regime.sh"
    46→zburc_kindle
    47→
    48→# Load BURS configuration and kindle
    49→z_station_file="${ZBUL_PROJECT_ROOT}/${BURC_STATION_FILE}"
    50→source "${z_station_file}" || exit 1
    51→source "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/buk/burs_regime.sh"
    52→zburs_kindle
    53→
    54→# Helper function to delegate to BURD
    55→# Usage: bul_launch "path/to/workbench.sh" "$@"
    56→bul_launch() {
    57→  local z_coordinator="$1"
    58→  shift
    59→
    60→  # Detect terminal width via /dev/tty (survives exec chain and dispatch pipes)
    61→  # Subshell probe: /dev/tty may exist but not be openable (CI, sandbox)
    62→  BURD_TERM_COLS=80
    63→  if (exec </dev/tty) 2>/dev/null; then
    64→    BURD_TERM_COLS=$(stty size </dev/tty 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}')
    65→    test -n "${BURD_TERM_COLS}" || BURD_TERM_COLS=80
    66→  fi
    67→  export BURD_TERM_COLS
    68→
    69→  export BURD_COORDINATOR_SCRIPT="${z_coordinator}"
    70→  exec "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}/buk/bud_dispatch.sh" "${1##*/}" "${@:2}"
    71→}
    72→
